title: Airbnb & Property Management Rockstar | OwnerRez Expert (PST Shift)
description:
Are you an Airbnb Property Management Rockstar who is fast, efficient, and tech-savvy?



We are an established, San Francisco Bay Area-based property management firm with nearly 8 years of success in the Short-Term Rental (STR/Airbnb/VRBO) and Long-Term Rental (LTR) industry. We have built a reputation for excellence, and we are looking for a seasoned professional to join our stable, high-performing team.



We don’t just need "customer service"—we need an Airbnb & Property Management Expert who understands the mechanics of the industry, moves quickly, and never lets a detail slip through the cracks.



Why Join Us?

Proven Stability: Work for a company with an 8-year track record in Airbnb and LTR management.

High-Speed Environment: We value efficiency. If you are fast and productive, you will thrive here.

Professional Standards: We have clear processes in place—no "startup" guesswork.

100% Remote: Long-term, stable remote work from your home office.



The Requirements (Strict)

Please do not apply if you only have general Call Center/BPO experience. We require specific Airbnb and Property Management expertise.

Direct Experience: Minimum 2+ years managing Short-Term Rentals (Airbnb/VRBO) and Long-Term Rentals.

PMS Mastery: Advanced proficiency in OwnerRez is highly preferred. You should know how to navigate workflows, triggers, and guest communication within the platform.

Operational Speed: Fast-thinking, fast-typing (60+ WPM), and able to handle multiple guest issues simultaneously.



Tech Stack: Knowledge of AI tools (ChatGPT), Time Doctor, and dual-monitor setups.



Your Responsibilities

Airbnb & Guest Management: Manage inquiries, bookings, and high-stakes resolution cases across Airbnb, VRBO, and direct sites.

Property Oversight: Coordinate check-ins/outs, send lease agreements, and monitor security.

Logistics & Maintenance: Schedule cleaning teams and review quality assurance photos.

Listing Optimization: Maintain and optimize Airbnb listings to ensure maximum occupancy and 5-star reviews.



Compensation & Benefits

Base Pay: Starting at $5/hour (Negotiable for extensive experience).

Schedule: Pacific Standard Time (PST) | Includes Weekends

Paid Leave: Accrued leave credits after 1 year.

Bonus: Performance-based bonuses.



How to Apply

To filter for the high-attention-to-detail candidates we need, please follow these steps exactly:



 your Resume to 
 Introduction: Record a brief intro highlighting your specific experience with OwnerRez, Airbnb, and STR/LTR management. (Share via Dropbox/Google Drive link).

Subject Line: Must be: [Property Management Specialist] – (Last Name, First Name)

Bonus: End your
 by telling us who the current Prime Minister of the United Kingdom is.

title: [URGENT] Guest Support Specialist – Direct Hire
description:
The Mission:

Join Luxostays, an established property management company with 8 years of industry expertise in the San Francisco Bay Area. We are not a hiring agency; you will be working directly for our internal team. We are seeking a high-caliber professional who thrives on operational precision, logic-based problem-solving, and the fast-paced nature of short-term rental (STR) management.



Why This Role?

Direct Engagement: Work directly with our leadership team (no middleman or agency).

Stability: Join a company with nearly a decade of success in the SF market.

High-Level Autonomy: We value "High D" personalities who can take command of a situation and drive resolutions without hand-holding.

Systems-Driven: We utilize a sophisticated tech stack (OwnerRez, VRBO, Slack, Time Doctor) for those who appreciate structured, efficient workflows.



The Schedule:

Full-Time (40 hours/week) | PST Timezone.

Rotating shifts including weekends (Business-critical coverage).



Your Core Responsibilities:

Command & Control: Oversee guest reservations, handle complex Airbnb resolutions, and manage security monitoring (CCTV). You are our first line of defense and the final word in guest satisfaction.

Logistics Coordination: Manage the "ripple effect" of turnovers. You will schedule cleaners, verify quality via photo audits, and coordinate specialized vendors (contractors, handymen) directly.

Asset Optimization: Maintain listing integrity across platforms, conduct due diligence research, and execute special administrative projects with 100% accuracy.

What We Require (The High-Standard Filter):

Critical Thinking: You must be able to de-escalate "urgent" maintenance or guest issues using logic and a "High D" approach—firm, fair, and fast.

Technical Proficiency: 2–4+ years in Airbnb/STR Management is mandatory. You must be comfortable with Time Doctor and AI-driven workflows.

The Setup: Reliable high-speed internet, a quiet environment, and a dual-monitor setup for maximum multitasking efficiency.

Education: College Degree required.

Compensation & Growth:

Starting Rate: $5/hour (Negotiable based on proven expertise in property operations).



Tiered Rewards: Skill-based pay increases, healthcare options, and year-end performance bonuses after 1 year of consistent excellence within our company.



How to Apply (Follow Precisely):

Failure to follow these instructions will result in immediate disqualification.

: 

Subject Line: [Guest Support Specialist] – (Last Name, First Name)

Attachments: Updated Resume + A Dropbox/Drive link to a 60-second audio intro explaining your specific experience in property management operations.

Compliance Test: At the end of your
, please answer this: Who is the current Prime Minister of London?

title: Remote Grant Writer (Manual Writing – No AI Tools)
description:
Help Fuel the Mission to Rebuild Communities With Equity at the Center

Parity Homes is seeking a passionate and detail-driven Remote Grant Writer to join our mission-aligned team. In this role, you will research funding opportunities, craft compelling proposals, and secure resources that directly support our work transforming long-abandoned Baltimore rowhomes into pathways to wealth, stability, and community resilience.

Our small but ambitious team values collaboration, transparency, and craftsmanship—not only in the homes we restore, but in the systems and partnerships we build. As part of a culture where every voice matters, your words will help shape the future of equitable housing investment.

Learn more about our mission in our TED Talk or visit us at 
.



Key Responsibilities

Research & Opportunity Identification

 • Conduct thorough research to identify grant opportunities aligned with Parity Homes’ mission and housing programs.

 • Stay informed on trends, best practices, and evolving strategies in the grant-funding landscape.



Proposal Development

 • Collaborate with organizational leaders and program staff to understand funding needs and strategic priorities.

 • Draft, edit, and prepare grant proposals, letters of intent, and supporting documents that clearly communicate our work, impact, and vision.

 • Ensure all submissions meet funder guidelines, requirements, and deadlines.



Submission & Follow-up

 • Manage the full grant submission process, ensuring timely and accurate application delivery.

 • Maintain organized records of all grant activities, submissions, and funder communications.

 • Follow up with funding agencies to track proposal progress and requests.

Grant Management & Reporting

 • Assist with the administration of awarded grants, ensuring compliance with all terms and reporting requirements.

 • Collaborate with finance and program teams to prepare financial statements, progress updates, and impact reports.



Relationship Building

 • Cultivate and maintain strong relationships with funders, partners, and potential donors.

 • Represent Parity Homes in meetings and communications with funding agencies.



Additional Responsibilities

 • Support strategic planning to align grant-seeking efforts with organizational goals.

 • Provide training and guidance to staff on grant-writing best practices.

 • Perform other duties as needed to advance the mission.



Qualifications

• Bachelor’s degree in English, Communications, Nonprofit Management, or a related field.

 • Proven experience as a grant writer with a track record of successful awards.

 • Exceptional written and verbal communication skills.

 • Strong research, analytical, and critical-thinking abilities.

 • High attention to detail and ability to meet tight deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

 • Proficiency with grant databases, online submission portals, and digital research tools.

 • Understanding of the nonprofit sector and funding ecosystem.



Preferred Attributes

 • Experience with grant administration and compliance reporting.

 • Ability to work both independently and collaboratively in a remote team setting.

 • Strong organizational and time-management skills.



Working Conditions

• Fully remote position with flexible working hours.

 • Reliable internet connection and a suitable home office environment required.



Performance Expectations

• Research at least 5 grant opportunities per week.

 • Prepare and submit 10 high-quality grant proposals per month.

 • Complete timely and accurate reporting for all active grants.



Join Us

If you are a strategic thinker with a love for storytelling, a commitment to accuracy, and a passion for expanding equitable housing solutions, we would love to hear from you. Apply today and help us secure the resources needed to build stronger, more resilient communities—one proposal at a time.

title: Graphic Artist
description:
Employment Type: Full-Time

Work Setup: Work from Home (w/ sometimes in-person meetings)

Salary: Php200-Php 400/hr



Apply here: 



Role Overview

The Graphic Artist is responsible for creating visual materials that support branding, marketing, and content initiatives. This role focuses on executing creative concepts into polished visual assets across digital and print platforms while maintaining consistency with brand guidelines.



Key ResponsibilitiesVisual Asset Creation

Produce graphic assets based on creative briefs and brand standards.

Execute layouts, typography, and visual treatments for approved concepts.

Ensure accuracy, clarity, and consistency across all designs.



Digital & Social Media Design

Create graphics for social media posts, stories, reels covers, ads, and thumbnails.

Resize and adapt designs for different platforms and formats.

Support ongoing content calendars and campaigns.



Print & Marketing Materials

Design posters, flyers, banners, brochures, and other marketing materials.

Prepare print-ready files and coordinate revisions as needed.

Assist with merchandise or packaging design when required.



Collaboration & Execution

Work closely with designers, marketers, and content teams.

Apply feedback efficiently and revise designs as needed.

Manage multiple tasks while meeting deadlines.



File Management

Organize project files, versions, and assets properly.

Maintain editable source files for future use.

Follow internal naming and archiving standards.



Qualifications

Experience as a Graphic Artist or similar role.

Proficient in Adobe Photoshop and Illustrator (InDesign or Figma is a plus).

Strong understanding of layout, typography, color, and visual hierarchy.

Detail-oriented and execution-focused.

Able to follow brand guidelines and creative direction.



Preferred Skills (Bonus)

Motion graphics or basic animation skills.

Experience designing for social media or digital-first content.

Knowledge of print production processes.

Familiarity with marketing or branding workflows.



What We’re Looking For

Someone reliable, organized, and deadline-driven.

Someone who executes clean, consistent designs.

Someone collaborative and open to feedback.

Someone who takes pride in visual quality.

?



About Us



Caring Hearts In-Home Help Pty Ltd is a growing community care provider delivering high-quality, person-centred supports across NDIS, Home Care Packages and private services. We pride ourselves on clinical oversight, strong governance, and compassionate service delivery.



We are seeking a reliable and experienced After Hours On-Call Coordinator with strong knowledge of NDIS protocols and incident management requirements to support our team outside standard business hours.

, SIRS (where relevant), and escalation pathways.

, complaints, and escalations accurately

 records

 and escalation processes

Roster Structure

?



Personal Attributes

?

mbers.

s in a friendly, professional tone

Pay

title: Scheduler & Virtual Assistant (High-Growth Opportunity)
description:
We are a rapidly expanding mobile pet grooming service in the USA. We currently operate 3 grooming vans with 6 professional groomers and are seeking a dedicated, long-term partner to help us manage our busy scheduling operations.



The Role

This is more than just data entry; you will eventually be the "air traffic controller" of the central scheduling hub of our business. You will use industry-specific software to manage our clients' appointment scheduling and the logistics of our mobile grooming vans, ensuring our clients receive a seamless experience.

Key Responsibilities:

• Smart Scheduling: Map new and existing clients to ensure our grooming appointments and mobile grooming vans operate efficiently within specific geographic areas.

• Client Communication: Manage most interactions via text through specialized industry software, with occasional phone support for complex inquiries.

• Retention Management: Proactively rebook, reschedule, and reinitiate clients when conflicts arise, or when clients have fallen off the schedule to keep our groomers fully booked.

• Operational Growth: Work closely with the owners to eventually take over more daily control of the scheduling operations.

What We Are Looking For

• Exceptional English: You must have advanced verbal and written English skills to communicate professionally with US-based clients.

• Logistical Mindset: You enjoy solving puzzles and figuring out the most efficient way to route multiple vehicles.

• Reliability: We treat our team with immense respect and provide top-tier pay opportunities; in return, we need someone who is punctual and rarely misses work.

• Ambition: This role is designed for someone who wants to build a long-term career and move into a leadership/management position as the company grows.

Compensation & Benefits

• Starting Wage: $5/hour ($860/month), with increases in pay after the training Phase and the candidate is able to take on a more independent role.

• Growth Potential: Pay increases are tied directly to your level of responsibility and performance.

• Full-Time: 40 plus hours per week.

• Equipment: We provide our team with the best tools to succeed.

Please respond with Posh at the beginning of your response so I know you read the full description.

title: USA SALES BOOKING AGENT FOR EST CALLING TIMES 3/2
description:
USD $500 starting salary per month plus commission of 1% of the the complete closing of the sale (average sale is $2000), paid on the 1st and 15th of every month(PST). We book an average of 10-20 shows per month.

If I need to close the sale completely, then you will get .5% commission for that lead. Commisions will be paid after the event takes place during that scheduled pay day.



PLEASE REVIEW MY MALE DANCE TOURING BUSINESS, 
 and if this is of interest PLEASE ANSWER MY 4 QUESTIONS below.



You MUST ANSWER the 4 questions in order to be considered.



QUESTION 1: WHAT IS YOUR ENGLISH SPEAKING CAPABILITY?

We are looking for people that have an english speaking capability on a scale of 1-10.

YOU MUST BE BETWEEN 9-10.

AGAIN, WHAT IS YOUR ENGLISH SPEAKING CAPABILITY?



QUESTION 2: DID YOU REVIEW THE WEBSITE ABOVE? You will be asked questions about our business.



Initial training/onboarding period (first 2 weeks):

To help you ease into the role and allow us to assess how we work together, we’ll start you at half the regular hours as follows:



Tuesday to Saturday: 4:00 AM – 8:00 AM PHT

 Corresponding to 3:00 PM – 7:00 PM EST (Mon–Fri)

Sunday: 7:00 AM – 10:00 AM PHT

 Corresponding to 6:00 PM – 9:00 PM EST (Sat)



After the 2-week period, assuming everything goes well, you’ll transition to the full-time schedule outlined below.



Full-time schedule (after the initial period):

Tuesday to Saturday: 12:00 AM – 8:00 AM PHT

Sunday: 4:00 AM – 10:00 AM PHT



This corresponds to the following times in US Eastern Standard Time (EST):

Monday to Friday: 11:00 AM – 7:00 PM EST

Saturday: 3:00 PM – 9:00 PM EST



QUESTION 3: Are you good with these hours?



I am looking for a long term, full time booking agent that will book our shows at bars, nightclubs and casinos in different states. You will gather leads by google searching for bars and nightclubs



Our workflow relies heavily on Google Workspace tools:

Google Sheets is used daily as a shared tracker for gathering and managing leads (bars/nightclubs we’re researching/touring), including columns for names, addresses, contacts, notes, status, etc.

We also use Google Docs for contracts, Google Drive for organizing and searching files, and Google Calendar for scheduling.

No advanced expertise is required—just solid familiarity so you can jump in quickly and keep things organized.



QUESTION 4: Do you have solid familiarity with Google Workspace tools?



We will train you with our sales script.

Must have a laptop or desktop AND preferably an Iphone with Icloud calendar. BUT an android will do. Also MUST have a headset WITH NOISE CANCELLATION.



GOOD LUCK!

Role Overview



We are looking for two experienced full-stack developers who can take loosely defined business objectives, ask the right clarifying questions, and independently deliver clean, production-ready solutions. These roles require strong problem-solving ability, confidence in managing ambiguity, and the capability to deliver end-to-end outcomes across integration, automation, and application development.

Lead routing, SMS/email workflows, and customer-journey nurturing

Customer mobile app redevelopment (iOS & Android)



End-to-end workflow automation using APIs, scraping, and integrations



Code repository management, CI/CD pipelines, Dockerised deployments



Key Responsibilities



Deliver project-based work from requirements clarification through to production.



Work with stakeholders to understand business needs and define technical requirements.



Design, build, and test backend APIs, integrations, and automations in Python.



Develop front-end components and applications using React (JavaScript/TypeScript).



Implement UI designs into functional, user-friendly interfaces.



Collaborate with other developers and internal teams across multi-discipline projects.



Work with the DBA on data models, pipelines, and efficient SQL usage.



Deploy and maintain applications in a Linux + Docker (on-prem) environment.



Use GitHub and standard version control practices for all development work.

Backend



Strong experience consuming and integrating third-party APIs.



HTTP web-scraping with BeautifulSoup, Scrapy, Selenium, or Playwright.



Building automation workflows using APIs + web-scraping logic.



SQL proficiency across Postgres, MariaDB, or MySQL.



Linux fundamentals (bash, cron, SSH, CLI).



Docker (building Dockerfiles, creating images, deploying containers).



Frontend



Strong React development (JavaScript + TypeScript).



Solid HTML/CSS for implementing UI designs.



Core Knowledge



OAuth and general authentication flows.



SQL basics including aggregates, CTEs, window functions.



Comfortable working within Linux/Docker-based development and deployment environments.



Nice to Have (Not Required)



Experience with Entra OAuth.



Power Platform Component Framework (PCF).



Webserver configuration (Apache, Nginx).



Sysadmin experience (Linux).



Networking/security awareness (OWASP Top-10, firewalls, CDNs like Cloudflare/Fastly).



Graphic design skills or UI polishing ability.



Experience with Microsoft Dynamics 365 CE or BC.



Ideal Candidate Profile



4–7+ years full-stack development experience.



End-to-end ownership mindset — gathers requirements, proposes solutions, delivers outcomes.



Strong communication skills; comfortable asking clarifying questions and managing stakeholders.



Enjoys working on varied projects across automation, apps, integrations, and system build-outs.



Thrives in a small, collaborative, fast-moving environment.

title: Engineering Manager (Delivery & Execution)
description:
We are seeking an Engineering manager who can own predictable delivery across engineering by enforcing sprint discipline, decision clarity, and execution standards. Reduce coordination cost, eliminate rework, and ensure that engineering output is reviewable, shippable, and on time.



Core Responsibilities



Sprint Ownership & Delivery Control

• Own sprint planning, execution, and closure

• Enforce sprint scope boundaries (no silent mid-sprint additions)

• Ensure all tickets entering a sprint meet Definition of Ready

• Track and act on: ticket aging, spillover, churn, blocked work

• Move tickets aggressively across states (TODO ? IN PROGRESS ? REVIEW ? DONE)

• Kill zombie tickets



Timebox Enforcement

• Treat timeboxes as coordination contracts, not estimates

• Require proactive communication before a timebox slips

• Block review if timebox standards are violated

• Escalate early, not after the fact



Execution Quality Gates

• Enforce: Definition of Ready (before sprint), Definition of Done (before release)

• Reject work that: contains implicit decisions, lacks acceptance criteria, introduces duplication without approval

• Ensure code review happens before QA

• Ensure QA does not compensate for missing engineering clarity



Decision Discipline (in partnership with TPM / Product)

• Require explicit tracking of: Open Decisions, Frozen Decisions

• Block execution on unresolved architectural decisions

• Ensure decisions are made by the right group, at the right time

• Prevent “decision by implementation”



5. Engineering Standards Enforcement

• Enforce agreed standards consistently: no duplication without approval, no implicit architecture decisions, no skipping ticket states

• Treat violations as delivery risk, not personal issues

• Track repeat violations and escalate



Required Skills & Traits



Must Have

• Strong judgment around delivery tradeoffs

• Comfort enforcing rules and saying “no”

• Ability to stop work and force alignment

• Low tolerance for ambiguity in execution

• Bias for early escalation over late heroics

• Calm under pressure, emotionally neutral

• Experience running sprints that actually ship

• Strong English language skills

• Familiarity with Jira-style workflows



Nice to Have

• Background as senior engineer

• Experience in SaaS / platform teams

• Worked alongside TPMs or Product Managers

title: Product Manager (Technical) / Software Architect
description:
We are seeking a Technical Product Manager / Architect who bridges product design and engineering execution. This role combines system-level thinking, architectural oversight, and clear, actionable documentation—producing deliverables engineers can build from directly. The ideal candidate can translate business needs into architecture diagrams, wireframes, and well-scoped tickets with code-level precision, ensuring efficient handoff and reduced rework.



Requirements & Documentation

• Author architecture-aware product specifications including system diagrams, logic flows, and key technical dependencies.

• Prepare engineer-ready tickets, including pseudocode, scaffolding, or sample API structures.

• Conduct architecture and code reviews, identifying potential design or implementation issues early.

• Build wireframes, mockups, and interaction flows using Figma or equivalent tools to align engineering and UX/UI early in the cycle.

• Collaborate with engineering to ensure technical feasibility and architectural scalability before feature commitment.

Cross-Functional Execution

• Work closely with engineering leads to break down architecture into structured deliverables and sprint-ready tasks.

• Lead technical review sessions to validate assumptions and architecture decisions before coding begins.



Qualifications

• Strong understanding of software architecture principles, REST APIs, and modular system design.

• Hands-on experience writing or reviewing code in PHP, JavaScript, and SQL preferred.

• Proficiency in creating wireframes, prototypes, and UI flows that accurately reflect data and system constraints.

• Ability to evaluate trade-offs between architectural purity, delivery speed, and scalability.

• Prior experience functioning as a bridge between engineering and design, ensuring clarity and readiness for execution.

title: VIDEO EDITOR
description:
I run a trading education YouTube channel (1.7K subs, growing). I'm looking for an editor that can do 6-8 videos/month (long-form 10-20 min) + 10-15 shorts/month.



I provide: Raw footage + script/outline + music preferences. You do: Cuts, transitions, captions, zoom effects, color correction, pacings and other effects.



Budget: $200-300/month ongoing. Send portfolio + do a test edit. If the chemistry is strong and the collaboration proves to be a good fit, I am open to a long-term, full time position.

title: Short-Form Video Editor for DJ / EDM Content (Instagram Reels)
description:
We are looking for a creative video editor / content assistant to help produce short-form content for an international DJ and music artist.



The content focuses on electronic music, DJ performances, festival energy, and Gen-Z style social media content.



The main goal of this role is to help create batches of content so there is always an “arsenal” of videos ready to post.



You will work with existing footage from DJ shows, studio sessions, and archive content to create engaging Instagram Reels.



Responsibilities:



Edit short-form vertical videos (Reels format 9:16)

Add viral hooks, captions, and text overlays

Suggest hook ideas and content improvements

Create multiple variations of the same video (for testing different hooks)

Sync new music to video clips

Repurpose older content with new angles

Follow social media trends and viral formats

Organise finished videos clearly into folders



Important:



I do NOT need help with scheduling posts.



I mainly need help producing batches of content and improving hooks so videos perform better.



Workflow example:



I may send 10–15 clips from a show.



You would:



Improve hooks

Create variations

Add captions

Prepare videos ready for posting



Requirements:



Basic video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere, or similar)

Good English communication

Interest in social media trends (TikTok / Reels)

Creative mindset and willingness to learn

Reliable and responsive



Interest in EDM / DJ culture is a bonus but not required.



Hours and Pay:



Part-time, flexible hours

3–5 hours per week

Initial budget $80–100 USD per month (trial period)



If the collaboration works well, there is opportunity for long-term work and increased pay.

title: Senior Graphic Designer
description:
The Role

We’re looking for a Senior Graphic Designer with a strong European design sensibility—refined typography, strong grid systems, and modern minimalism. You’ll work across three core design pillars while owning projects end-to-end, from concept to final production, ensuring consistency and excellence across all brand touchpoints.



Design Pillars

- Product Design – Designing user-friendly, visually consistent product experiences

- Print / Magazine / Advertising – Editorial layouts, advertising materials, and high-quality print-ready assets

- Commercial Materials – Banners, social media posts, newsletters, roll-ups, and sales materials



What You’ll Do

- Lead design work across product, print, and commercial materials

- Take full ownership of design projects from concept to execution

- Translate performance and marketing insights into creative improvements

- Maintain, document, and evolve brand systems with consistency

- Ensure all assets meet high production and quality standards

- Collaborate closely with copy, media buying, and growth teams

- Mentor junior designers and provide clear, constructive feedback



What We’re Looking For

- 5+ years of professional graphic design experience

- Strong portfolio showcasing European-style design (typography, grids, minimal aesthetics)

- Mastery of Adobe Creative Suite and Figma

- Experience working on both digital and print outputs

- Excellent eye for layout, typography, spacing, and visual hierarchy



Nice-to-Haves

- Motion design skills (After Effects, basic animation)

- Experience adapting European design styles for SEA audiences

- Knowledge of responsive and web layout design

title: Part-Time Video Editor
description:
Job Title: Part-Time Video Editor

20 hours per week – $100–$200 USD per month



I’m looking for a fast, organized video editor to handle daily short-form content for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts. You’ll take raw footage and turn it into engaging 30–60 second vertical videos. As we grow, there will also be opportunities to work on longer YouTube videos and other projects.



This is for my personal brand and my sauce company. I’m planning to post 1–3 short videos per day, so I need someone who can move quickly and stay consistent. The focus is strong hooks, clean pacing, and high retention.



Responsibilities

 – Edit 30–60 second vertical videos with strong hooks and fast pacing

 – Add dynamic captions and clean typography

 – Basic color grading and audio cleanup (noise reduction, leveling, music ducking)

 – Keep project files organized and easy to transfer



Requirements

 – Fast turn around time

 – Around 20 hours of availability per week

 – Good communication and open to feedback



I need someone who can edit at the level of the videos below or higher


==





How to Apply (Incomplete applications won’t be reviewed)

Send:

 – A short message about you

 – Links to 2–3 short-form videos you’ve edited (similar style)

 – What software you use

 – Any limitations with your setup (for example, can you edit 4K?)

 – Your ideal monthly pay and how much you can work per week

 – Your consistent weekly availability in EST (example: 5pm–9pm Monday through Friday)

That’s it.

title: Elite Cold Caller / DM Setter – Performance Based
description:
We are hiring experienced cold callers and/or DM setters for our marketing agency.



You will be cold calling service-based businesses across the United States, slightly pitching our service, and booking qualified meetings for our sales team. Your job is not to close — your job is to build interest and book the call.



KPI: Minimum 3 booked meetings per day.



Hours: You must be available 4–5 hours per day within 8AM–6PM EST.



This is performance-based. If you hit KPIs consistently, you will make very good money here.



Requirements:

• Proven cold calling experience (not beginners)

• Fluent English (neutral / American-sounding preferred)

• Strong objection handling

• Comfortable dialing daily

• Performance-based mindset

• Preferably CC $5K+ experience

• US-based preferred (Filipino applicants welcome if English is strong)



This is not for beginners. We need people who already know how to control conversations, keep business owners engaged, and hit KPIs consistently.



Only serious applicants with real experience.

title: Instagram DM Appointment Setter (Performance-Based | Marketing Agency)
description:

You are NOT closing. You are starting conversations and booking calls.



KPI:

• 100 DMs per day

• 2 booked meetings every 3 days



This is performance-based. The more quality conversations you create, the more you earn.



Requirements:

• Proven DM setting experience (not beginners)

• Fluent English

• Strong communication skills

• Comfortable with daily KPIs

• Performance-based mindset

• Able to keep conversations flowing naturally



This is not for beginners. We need people who already understand how to build interest, handle light objections, and move conversations toward a booked meeting.



Only serious applicants with real experience.

title: Short Form video Editor
description:
Hello,



Our names are Matt and Julia.

We are looking to find an editor to work with us full-time over the long-term.

We run a 'long-form' YouTube channel and have hours and hours of long-form content that we would like to turn in to viral short form videos, as well as, purpose filmed short form content to be edited.



Firstly, we are looking to hire someone for a trial project, with a view to working full time together in the longer term.





A detailed brief of what we are looking for from this trial and project:

- Initially we would like to get one trial reel from you , and then move forward together on the entire project if it is a good fit for both us and you.



We will provide you with:

- 5 hours of podcast-style content, where me (Matt), Julia and a friend are answering questions about travel and our experiences.



We would like from you:

- One trial reel from this footage.



In the trial reel we would like to see:

- Clips of both the person asking and answering, and the reactions of each person (so it feels like a two-way conversation)

- Clips from our long-form videos over the top of us, for context to some of the answers

- Speech-to-text on screen

- Some (not over-the-top) sound effects

- Some photos/graphics on screen for context to our answers (the graphics appearing behind us would be great).

- Some light key-framing, if you feel it is needed







As mentioned above, beyond this trial project, we are looking for someone to work with us in the long-term, full-time to repurpose our long-form content in to Short-form and edit future short-form content.





Thanks, Matt and Julia

title: Full-Time Real Estate Marketing & Operations Virtual Assistant
description:
Virtual Luxe Solutions is seeking a highly organized, proactive Real Estate Marketing & Operations Virtual Assistant to support a growing, listing-focused real estate team under LPT Realty.



This is a full-time, long-term opportunity for someone who thrives in real estate, loves structure, and takes ownership without needing constant reminders.



We are not looking for a task-taker.

We are looking for a partner in operations.



About the Client

Our client is a listing-heavy real estate team (2 people) focused on growth, systems, and consistent marketing. They are transitioning into Follow Up Boss and AgentFire and are looking for someone who can help build structure, streamline processes, and bring consistency to their marketing and database management.



Responsibilities

- Marketing & Content Support

- Create and schedule social media content using Canva

- Draft and manage monthly newsletters

- Create buyer guides, seller guides, and listing marketing materials

- Support
 marketing campaigns (Follow Up Boss / Flodesk)

- Maintain brand consistency across platforms

- Assist with campaign planning and event promotions

- Implement structured monthly marketing plans



CRM & Database Management

- Clean up and organize Follow Up Boss CRM

- Tag, segment, and maintain database accuracy

- Support website transition to AgentFire

- Build and maintain automated follow-up workflows

- Monitor engagement and suggest improvements



Operations & Systems

- Help finalize and implement listing and buyer systems

- Document workflows and create simple SOPs

- Organize Google Drive and shared documents

- Support inbox organization and follow-up

- Assist with lead follow-up coordination (ex: confirming pre-approvals, lender communication)



Ideal Candidate



You are:

- Highly detail-oriented

- Naturally proactive (you do not wait to be reminded)

- Comfortable managing multi-step projects

- Strong in written communication

- Organized and systems-minded

- Confident working independently

- Able to give realistic timelines and meet them



Preferred experience:

- Real estate admin or marketing support

- Follow Up Boss experience (strong plus)

- AgentFire familiarity (plus)

- Canva (required)

- Experience implementing or cleaning up systems



Tools You’ll Use

- Canva (required)

- Follow Up Boss

- AgentFire (transition in progress)

- Google Workspace

- Flodesk (or similar
 marketing tool)

- LPT Connect

- Zoom



Schedule

- 40 hours per week

- Monday–Friday

- 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST



Benefits

- 5 Paid Time Off (PTO) days annually - After 90 Days

- Paid holidays (Christmas, Thanksgiving, New Years Day and Independence Day)

- 2 Floating holidays per year

- Ongoing leadership support through Virtual Luxe Solutions

- Structured onboarding and clear expectations



To Apply



Please
:

- Resume

- Brief introduction explaining why you are a strong fit

- Subject Line: Real Estate Marketing VA Application – [Your Name]

title: Financial Advisor
description:
Sun Life of Canada (Philippines), Inc is the number 1 life insurance company in the Philippines, trusted by millions of Filipinos for over 125 years. We are expanding our team and inviting motivated individuals to build a fulfilling and rewarding career as a Financial Advisor.



This opportunity is open to candidates from all backgrounds. No prior experience in finance or insurance is required. We provide the training, support, and tools to help you succeed.



What You Will Do:

Guide clients in attracting, building, and protecting wealth through structured financial strategies

Help individuals and families create long-term financial security through proper wealth positioning and diversification

Design personalised financial plans that align with life goals such as business growth, family protection, and retirement

Educate clients on smart wealth allocation across savings, protection, and investment solutions

Build a strong and sustainable client portfolio based on trust, service, and long-term value



What You Can Expect:

Salary plus bonuses

Structured career progression with clear paths to leadership and management roles

Access to world-class training programmes at no cost

Mentorship from experienced leaders, trainers, and industry motivators

Flexible schedule that allows you to manage your own time

Recognition, awards, and performance incentives

Travel incentives both locally and internationally



Who We Are Looking For:

Strong communication and relationship-building skills

Self-motivated, goal-oriented, and coachable

Professional, ethical, and service-driven

Willing to undergo licensure and continuous training



If you are looking for a career where your effort determines your income, where growth is based on performance, and where you can make a real difference in people's lives, we would be glad to speak with you.



Apply today and start building your future with Sun Life of Canada (Philippines), Inc.

title: Meta / Facebook Ads Assistant
description:
I run a UK web design business and I’m looking for a reliable, organised, and cost-effective person to help with Meta /
 Ads.



The main goal is to generate more enquiries and sales for my website services. I want someone who understands Meta Ads well, is switched on, communicates clearly, and is interested in building something long term if we work well together.



I want to stay heavily involved in the process, so this is a collaborative role. We’ll review campaigns together, analyse data, test ideas, improve creatives, and work on getting better results over time. I also want to keep learning Meta Ads properly in the process, so I value someone who can explain their thinking clearly.



I have already spent around £800 on ads, so there is some existing data to review. Over the next couple of weeks, I’m also preparing more creative assets including video testimonials, social proof, and fresh ad content.



I’m also well connected in this space. I share an office with someone who has been running
 Ads for around 4 years and is currently doing around £20k/month in revenue largely through
 Ads. I also have another experienced contact who is strong with Meta Ads. They won’t be managing campaigns directly, but I can get additional feedback and ideas from them, which can help us improve performance and keep learning.



This could become a long-term opportunity for the right person. If things go well, there may also be future work helping with campaigns for my clients too, mainly UK trade and service businesses such as roofers, plumbers, and similar companies.



What I’m looking for:



Solid experience with Meta /
 Ads



Good communication and decent English



Honest, dependable, and organised



Willing to work collaboratively and review performance regularly



Open to learning, testing, and improving over time



Ideally within a budget of around $5/hour



You do not need to have lots of direct experience in UK trade business lead generation specifically, as long as you have a strong understanding of Meta Ads and can apply your skills well. If you do have experience with lead generation or UK businesses, that is a bonus.



Bonus if you can also help with:



Basic video editing or creative support

This is helpful, but not essential.



Please apply with:



Your Meta Ads experience



What types of campaigns or businesses you have worked on



Any results or wins you have helped achieve



Your hourly rate



Whether you are comfortable reviewing campaigns together on calls



Start your proposal with “Blue Ladder” so I know you read the post properly



I’m looking for someone with the right attitude, good communication, strong effort, and real interest in doing good work. If you’re skilled, reliable, and want to grow with the opportunity, I’d be glad to hear from you.

To make that happen, we are looking for a highly skilled and performance-driven Experienced Media Buyer to join our team.



This is NOT a beginner role.

We are looking for someone who understands the full ecommerce ecosystem and knows how to launch, test, scale, and kill products profitably.



You must understand the whole process and must be highly developed in communication. Therefore, please apply with the word strawberry before you introduce yourself. Read on to find out what tasks we expect you to perform, as well as the experience we feel is necessary for this job.



What You’ll Be Doing

- Testing creatives and angles

 Ads Manager (Must)

Career growth opportunities

Video training & structured systems



We are building something big.



If you are a serious media buyer who wants to grow with a company and scale hard, apply now to this post.

The model is simple:

title: Looking for a Thumbnail Designer for my Space/Universe YouTube Channel
description:
Hey!

I am looking for a talented designer to create thumbnails for my space and universe YouTube channel.

Pay is $5 per thumbnail.

I will provide the video title, a brief description of the video topic, and any specific ideas I have for the thumbnail. You will be responsible for the creative execution.

I am looking for someone who:



Has experience creating YouTube thumbnails specifically

Has a strong understanding of what makes a thumbnail perform well, high CTR design, bold text, contrast, visual hierarchy

Proficient in Photoshop, Canva, or similar design tools

Fluent in English

Able to deliver within 24 hours

Familiar with the space and science aesthetic, dark backgrounds, cinematic imagery, dramatic composition



The style should be cinematic and mysterious. Think dark backgrounds, bold white text, dramatic space imagery. Our channel covers deep space topics so thumbnails should feel epic and slightly unsettling, not bright and cartoonish.

If you have read the middle of this job description, please type your favorite planet at the beginning or end of your proposal.

Please look at channels like BeyondTheBlue (black thumbnails), and Cosmic Lens for reference on the aesthetic we are going for.

If you have ever made thumbnails for a space, science or documentary style YouTube channel, please attach samples of your work.

I look forward to hopefully working with you!

Questions:



Share 3 thumbnail examples you have made that you are most proud of

Have you ever designed thumbnails for a space or science channel? Please share examples

What software do you use to create thumbnails?

Please only share Google Drive, Imgur or direct image links

title: Amazon OA Specialist & Store Manager (USA)
description:
I am seeking a dedicated, high-level Virtual Assistant to launch and manage a new Amazon US Online Arbitrage store. I am looking for a long-term professional who can work independently and navigate the strict 2026 Amazon landscape to deliver consistent, profitable results.



???? Your Responsibilities

Sourcing: Identify 5–10 high-velocity OA leads daily using SellerAmp and Keepa.



Store Management: Full handling of Seller Central, including listing products and monitoring account health.



Logistics & Boxem: Create and manage shipments using Boxem. You will ensure 100% compliance with Amazon’s inbound box rules (standard weight under 50 lbs and specific safety labeling) to avoid the high 2026 Inbound Defect Fees.



3PL Coordination: Act as the primary bridge between our suppliers and our Prep Center. You will send "Buy Lists," track deliveries, and provide the 3PL with FBA labels and clear prep instructions.



Ungating: Proactively manage the ungating process. You must know how to identify "Auto-Ungate" opportunities and handle the application process for gated categories/brands.



Reporting: Update our Google Sheet daily with ROI, net profit (after 3PL and shipping fees), and sales velocity.



???? Requirements

Experience: 2+ years working with US-based Amazon sellers (specifically in Online Arbitrage).



Software Mastery: Expert-level Keepa, SellerAmp, and Boxem/InventoryLab.



Logistics Knowledge: Proven ability to communicate professionally with US-based 3PL services and an understanding of the 2026 requirement for third-party prep.



Compliance Expert: Deep understanding of Amazon’s inbound performance requirements and IP Risk management.



Reliability: High-speed internet and a "problem-solver" mindset.



???? Benefits

Fixed Bi-Weekly Salary: Reliable, on-time payments.



Performance Bonuses: Additional bonuses provided based on the store's profit growth and meeting sourcing targets.



Long-Term Partnership: I am looking for a core team member to grow with the business.



Flexible Hours: Work on a schedule that fits your productivity.



???? How to Apply (Read Carefully)

To be considered, your application must include the following:



Proof of Work: Attach 2–3 screenshots of Keepa charts for products you have successfully sourced in the past.



The Logic Test: * Explain why the products in your screenshots were "good buys" (mention Sales Rank, 90-day Buy Box stability, and competition).



If a product is gated, what are the first two steps you take to try and ungate it?



What is the maximum weight a standard box can be for FBA, and what happens in 2026 if a shipment has "Inbound Defects"?



Software: Confirm which Amazon tools you currently have active access to.



Attention to Detail: What is your favorite animal and why?



Subject Line: Please make your subject line: [Your Name] - Amazon VA Rockstar 2026

title: Social Media & Content Manager
description:
***At Polaris, we’re on the lookout for a driven, detail-oriented, and marketing-savvy Marketing and Acquisitions Assistant to join our world-class team. If you thrive in fast-paced environments, love the idea of being the operational backbone of a company’s marketing engine, and have strong hands-on experience with GoHighLevel, content creation, CRM systems, and social media, this role is for you.



***About us:

Polaris is a consulting agency with a bold mission: To help 1 million Founders to leverage time, reclaim freedom, and scale without sacrifice. We’re the only firm blending coaching and done-for-you services through a hybrid model — empowering our clients with strategic delegation, streamlined operations, and scalable systems. 



***Who we are looking for:

The ideal candidate is a detail-oriented, creative and dependable team player with experience working as a part of a high performing team and someone with a strong background in social media and content strategy.

You have a proven track record of planning, creating and executing engaging content in the online education and high-ticket service space (i.e. Coaches, agencies, advisors). Leading to increased visibility, higher engagement and creating content that convert followers into leads. 



In addition to consistent content output, it is expected that you’ll display a high level of proactiveness towards improving the management and sharing of content, maximizing the use of current tools or materials of the organization in a smart way and working closely with the Founder as a key part of the team. 



***Key Responsibilities

Content management:

- Create content that aligns with current trends and industry best practices, while managing content calendars to ensure posts go out consistently and on time.

- Collaborate with the leadership team to ensure content reflects key brand messages and marketing goals.

- Set up and manage tools like website domains, business
s, text messaging, and Google profiles, and keep marketing automations and workflows running smoothly.



Video editing:

- Apply video edits such as cuts/transitions, audio overlays, cinematic inserts and other edits that align with the brand and content goals.

- Create engaging short-form reels for platforms such as Instagram and TikTok

- Assist in editing long form videos for podcast interviews and youtube. 

- Create eye catching thumbnails

- Audience Management and prospecting:

- Send connection requests, monitor, respond to, send and engage with comments, messages, and mentions on social media platforms to build meaningful connections and foster a positive brand image.

- Ensure the contact database is regularly updated and accurately organized, while segmenting
 lists to enable targeted and effective communication



CRM Workflows

- Efficiently manage client relationships through customized CRM workflows

Tracking leads in real time, automating follow-ups, and syncing seamlessly with your favorite tools.

- Monitor KPIs in real time to refine strategies and ensure every campaign, workflow, and funnel delivers measurable ROI.



Tracking and reporting:

- Generate regular reports and provide analytics on content,
, and campaign performance.

- Monitoring and reporting on paid media performance by tracking metrics such as CPM, CPL, leads generated, and CPA.

- Overseeing and monitoring pipeline and opportunities, ensuring that leads are effectively tracked, followed up on, and moved through the stages



RESULTS (KPIs)

- 100% on time publication of content according to content calendar

- Minimize response time towards audience engagements and inquiries

- Increase overall social media engagement, audience growth and lead generation

- Consistent and accurate reporting of content and marketing performance metrics



SKILLS REQUIRED:

- Proficient in using video editing tools like Capcut, Descript, Davinci Resolve

- Ability to edit graphics using tools like Canva and Photoshop

- Proficient in using CRMs like Active Campaign, GoHighLevel and Clickfunnels

- Experience in Google Workspace (Gmail, GDrive, Docs, Sheets)

- Experience in Microsoft Office Workspace

- Understand the algorithm of different social media platforms

- Prior experience managing social media and content of personality-driven businesses



WORK SCHEDULE:

- Full time position. 8 hours per day. Monday to Friday.

- Exact shift times will be based on the job role.

- Depending on the demand, you may be required to work during any of these timezones: All North American time zones, European time zones, Australia/Asia Pacific time zones.



COMPENSATION STRUCTURE AND PERKS:

- Hourly rate starting from 4 USD / hour

- Eligibility for quarterly bonuses upon hitting performance KPIs. Up to 800USD

- Pay rise potential according to experience and performance

- Opportunity to be hired for projects at higher one-off fees on top of standard salary

- Work from home privilege

- Opportunity to work with a high-performing team



***HOW TO APPLY:

If you meet all the above requirements and are confident that you are a great fit for this position, submit your application by clicking on the following link:

???? 
/to/z3OTqcwU

???? We also prefer you to like Pink Elephants 



Please do NOT private message us regarding this job. We have a hiring process in place and will only accept applicants who can follow the process.



Place the word "I am" at the start of your full name in the application form.

MUST HAVE STRONG INTERNET CONNECTION

MUST HAVE FAST COMPUTER



PART-TIME HOURS

USA - 6am 10am PST =. 10PM-2AM MANILA TIME



MUST WORK FAST

MUST RESPOND TO OUR TEAM FAST





If you have experience in prepress and the printing industry then this position is perfect for you! The candidate must also have an excellent understanding of both offset and digital printing processes.



The main purpose of the role is to prepress all of our files and prepare them to upload on the server for printing. Graphic design experience is a plus. Most designs we do are simple and we use templates as well.



WE WANT SOMEONE WHO CAN CHAT WITH US IN REAL-TIME

title: Video Editor, Script Writer & Visuals
description:
Long-Form YouTube Scriptwriter – True Crime / Organized Crime (15–20 min)



Description:



I run a fast-growing YouTube channel focused on high-level crime documentaries (organized crime, cartels, mafia networks, financial crime, intelligence ties).



I’m looking for a serious researcher + writer who can create gripping, well-structured, documentary-style scripts (15–20 minutes, ~2,500–3,500 words).



This is NOT generic storytelling. I want:



Strong hook in first 30 seconds

title: Experienced B2B Cold Caller
description:
*** PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE DESCRIPTION BEFORE APPLYING ***





IMPORTANT:



- We are ONLY looking for candidates with REAL B2B cold calling experience.  

- If you have only worked warm leads, inbound calls, or appointment setting from ads, do not apply.



COMPANY INFO:



- My name is Jordan. I am the founder of a fast-growing company that helps small businesses never miss a call using an A.I. Receptionist.

- This is a simple, high-demand service that business owners immediately understand. We are looking for 1–2 strong cold callers to help introduce it to small business owners across the U.S.

- We are not a large corporate call center. We work closely with a small team and focus on rewarding performance.



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



- Source your own B2B leads

- Cold call small business owners

- Book them for a free consultation

- Ensure they show up to the call

- You do not close deals.  Our closing team handles everything after.  Your only job is to get them to show-up.



MUST HAVE (DO NOT APPLY IF THIS DOES NOT DESCRIBE YOU):



- Proven B2B cold calling experience

- Strong English with no heavy accent

- Reliable internet and a quiet workspace

- Comfortable making high-volume outbound calls

- Put the phrase “I love to dial” in your subject line



COMPENSATION:



- We offer 2 pay plans:

----- $25 per attended show-up

----- $100 per closed deal

----- Monthly performance bonuses

OR

----- $2/hour + $25/show-up

(The first pay plan is preferred as we are looking for a true hustler)



HOURS:



- Part-time (20 hours per week) with the option to transition to full time

- Schedule: 2:00 AM – 6:00 AM Philippine Time



HOW TO APPLY:



- Do not send a generic message.

- In your application, include 2 things: Your specific B2B cold calling experience AND why this role fits you

- Do not use chat GPT or similar responses, those will be rejected.

title: Dispatcher/Assistant
description:
Din Family Transport is seeking a reliable and detail-oriented NEMT Operations Coordinator / Dispatcher to help manage daily transportation operations.

This role is essential to ensuring patients are transported safely, on time, and efficiently while supporting drivers and maintaining smooth daily scheduling.

The ideal candidate must be organized, proactive, and comfortable making real-time decisions during live transportation operations.

???? Key Responsibilities

???? Patient & Ride Coordination

Confirm rides with patients one day prior to appointments

Verify pickup times, appointment times, and special instructions

Communicate updates or schedule changes clearly

???? Live Dispatch & Decision Making

Monitor active rides throughout the day

Coordinate with drivers regarding arrivals, delays, and return trips

Make quick operational decisions to keep schedules on track

Assist with handling unexpected changes or issues in real time

???? Scheduling & Portal Management

Fill and adjust driver schedules through transportation portals

Assign rides based on driver location and availability

Update trip statuses and ride notes as needed

???? Route Planning

Create efficient daily routes using Google Maps and Apple Maps

Plan next-day routes to reduce drive time and improve efficiency

Optimize ride stacking when possible

? Qualifications

Experience in dispatching, transportation, logistics, or NEMT (preferred)

Strong communication and organizational skills

Ability to multitask in a fast-paced environment

Comfortable speaking with patients and drivers professionally

Problem-solving mindset with confidence making live decisions

Familiarity with mapping/navigation apps

? Preferred Skills

Prior NEMT or medical transportation experience

Understanding of appointment-based scheduling

Experience using dispatch or broker portals

Strong attention to timing and logistics

???? What Success Looks Like

Drivers leave each day with clear routes and instructions

Patients are confirmed and prepared ahead of time

Schedules run smoothly with minimal delays

Real-time problems are solved quickly and professionally

???? Growth Opportunity

This role has strong potential to grow into a Lead Dispatcher / Operations Manager as Din Family Transport continues to expand.

title: Mortgage Cold Calling & Loan Officer Assistant (Remote)
description:
We are looking for a long term, full time virtual assistant from the Philippines to help with cold calling, lead follow up, and simple admin work for a U.S. mortgage business. This is a stable role with clear tasks and training provided.



About the role

You will spend most of your time calling leads (new, old, and past clients) to find people interested in refinancing or getting a new home loan. You will ask basic questions, gather simple information, and set appointments for the lead mortgage loan originator. You will not sell or give loan advice; you will focus on calling, gathering info, and organizing the leads.



Main responsibilities

• Make outbound calls to a list of leads each day (cold and warm leads).

• Ask a short list of simple questions (reason for loan, timing, basic income range, property plans, etc.).

• Identify who is interested and set appointments for the lead mortgage originator.

• Take clear notes from each call and update the CRM with status (interested, follow?up, not interested, wrong number, etc.).

Spend a small part of each day learning basic information about mortgage loan programs so you can ask better questions over time.

What we are looking for

• Strong spoken English and clear, friendly phone manner.

• Comfortable making many outbound calls every day.

• Good listening skills and accurate note?taking.

• Reliable internet, a quiet place to work, and a good headset.

• Organized, follows instructions, and open to feedback.

• Willing to learn about the U.S. mortgage process over time.

title: Payroll, Compliance & Payables Officer
description:
Position: Payroll, Compliance & Payables Officer

Location: Remote (Philippines-Based)

Employment Type: Full-Time, Dayshift

Reports to: Head of Operations



 - Why This Role Matters -



At Maid My Day, we believe that caring for our cleaners helps them care better for elderly Australians living at home.

Since 2006, we’ve supported the Aged Care community across Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, ACT, and South Australia. With over 200+ cleaners, accurate payroll and strong compliance help our team feel secure, respected, and valued.



This role is more than finance administration. It helps protect trust. When payroll is accurate and compliance is handled properly, our frontline workers can focus on serving clients with dignity.



If you value accuracy, take ownership, and like doing things right the first time, this role offers meaningful impact.





- The Role - 

We are currently seeking an experienced Payroll, Compliance & Finance Officer to join our team. In this role, you will take ownership of payroll operations, statutory compliance, financial bookkeeping assistance, and payment processing across the business.



Key Responsibilities



1. Payroll Management and Processing via Quickbooks

End-to-end Home Support Worker payroll processing

Internal staff payroll processing

Timesheet verification and payslip management

System updates for onboarding and offboarding employees



2. Compliance Preparation and Completion

Business compliance (superannuation, tax payment preparation assistance, insurance renewals, aged care compliance documents etc.)



3. Payments & Financial Transactions via BBO and Xero

Accounts payable processing and reconciliation

Assisting the maintenance of accurate bookkeeping records



- What We’re Looking For -

Experience

Minimum 3 years working in a Finance Department handling end-to-end related tasks

Experience in Quickbooks & Xero

Comfortable with cloud-based systems

Google Docs proficiency is essential

Commit to the 8:30am to 4:30am shift 

Highly organised with strong time management

Meticulous attention to detail

Proactive communicator who raises issues early

Calm and steady under deadline pressure

We are looking for someone who wants long-term stability and growth -  not just a short-term role.



- What we offer -

A stable, values-led organisation with clear expectations

Full-time, work-from-home role with fixed hours

A supportive leadership team that cares about doing things well

Opportunities to grow with the business and shape how we support our workforce



- How to Apply -

If you take pride in getting the details right, value clear standards, and understand that accurate payroll and strong compliance directly impact people’s lives, we’d love to hear from you.

Please
 Chelle at 
 with:

- Subject line: Payroll, Compliance & Payables Officer

- Your resume

- Active contact number

- A short note on why this role resonates with you

Fluent in spoken and written English

This role is not ideal for someone who:

Training is provided. What matters most is professionalism, discipline, and the ability to adapt quickly.



Compensation & Benefits

$20/month internet subsidy



After 6 Months:

SSS & PhilHealth subsidy

13th month pay



After 1 Year:

Paid Time Off (PTO)

Bereavement leave 

Paid Philippine national holidays



Work Commitment

mbers who treat this as a serious professional commitment.



How to Apply

Begin your
 with the word “VA47”

title: Client Success Manager (RN)
description:
JOB DESCRIPTION SUMMARY:



We are seeking an experienced and driven Client Success Manager who is a Registered Nurse (RN) with a strong

background in clinical operations and sales acumen. This role is essential in ensuring our clients — primarily healthcare

organizations — receive exceptional service, achieve their goals, and recognize continuous value from our solutions.

The ideal candidate combines clinical knowledge with business acumen to build lasting relationships, optimize client

outcomes, and contribute to revenue growth.



RESPONSIBILITIES:

Client Relationship Management:

* Act as the main point of contact for clients, fostering strong, trust-based relationships.

Understand client goals, challenges, and processes to ensure their continued success.

* Conduct regular performance reviews with clients to track success, address concerns, and implement

improvement strategies.

* Clinical Expertise & Consulting:

Leverage nursing and healthcare knowledge to advise clients on best practices, operational improvements, and

clinical efficiencies.

* Ensure solutions align with client workflows, regulatory requirements, and patient care standards.

Support problem resolution by combining clinical insights with business solutions.



Sales & Growth Support:

* Identify opportunities for service expansion, upselling, and cross-selling to support revenue growth.

* Assist in sales presentations, leveraging clinical expertise to demonstrate value and build credibility.

* Collaborate with sales and marketing teams to ensure client retention and promote additional services.



Operational Excellence:

* Oversee client onboarding, implementation, and ongoing performance to ensure a smooth and successful

experience.

* Monitor key success metrics, driving proactive engagement and continuous improvement.

* Address and resolve client challenges, ensuring high levels of satisfaction and loyalty.



QUALIFICATIONS:

* Active Registered Nurse (RN) license (in good standing).

* 2+ years of clinical experience is a must.

* 2+ years of experience in sales, account management, or client success (healthcare-related services preferred).

* Strong communication, negotiation, and presentation skills.

* Proven ability to build and nurture long-term client relationships.

* Excellent problem-solving and critical-thinking abilities.

* Proficiency with CRM software and Microsoft Office Suite
