title: Senior GoHighLevel Agency Operator — Full Time Remote
description:
WHO WE ARE

Revenue Doctor is a fast-growing technology automation agency headquartered in Texas, United States. We are founded and led by a physician, Harvard Business School AI certificate holder, and healthcare Chief Information Officer. We build done-for-you revenue recovery and lead generation systems for small businesses using GoHighLevel as our core platform.

Our clients are primarily trades businesses — HVAC, roofing, plumbing, electrical, and security companies — and we are rapidly expanding into property management, real estate, medical practices, and professional services across the United States.

We are not a typical marketing agency. We are a precision automation firm that diagnoses revenue leaks and prescribes systems that fix them permanently. We are building one of the most sophisticated GoHighLevel agency operations in the United States and we are looking for one exceptional operator who wants to grow with us from the ground floor into a senior leadership role as we scale aggressively over the next 12 to 24 months.

This is not a small side project. This is a serious, well-funded agency with significant investment behind it, a growing client roster, and an aggressive expansion roadmap. If you want to be part of building something significant from the inside — this is your opportunity.



THE ROLE

You will be our primary GoHighLevel Agency Operator responsible for building, managing, and continuously optimizing our entire client portfolio inside GoHighLevel. You are not a virtual assistant doing basic tasks. You are a technical expert who owns our platform operations completely.

You will work directly with the founder and report only to him. You will have significant autonomy and significant responsibility. You will be the operational backbone of Revenue Doctor and as we grow your role will grow with us into a Director of Operations position overseeing a team of operators, specialists, and virtual assistants.

This role requires someone who does not need hand-holding, does not wait to be told what to do, proactively identifies problems before they become client issues, and holds themselves to an extraordinarily high standard of technical excellence and professional communication.



PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITIES

Agency Platform Management

— Manage our GoHighLevel agency account and all client sub-accounts on a daily basis

— Monitor all client automations weekly and resolve errors immediately before they impact client results

— Maintain complete system integrity across all sub-accounts at all times

— Proactively identify automation failures, workflow errors, and platform issues before clients ever notice them

— Manage Twilio phone numbers across all client accounts including provisioning, troubleshooting, and optimization

— Maintain A2P 10DLC registration compliance across all client SMS sending accounts

— Configure and maintain TCPA compliant opt-out handling across all automations at all times

Client Onboarding and Setup

— Clone our master snapshot and fully onboard new clients within 24 hours of contract signing

— Complete our post-clone checklist for every new client with zero errors before going live

— Provision new local Twilio phone numbers for each client with correct regional area codes

— Configure business hours, after hours automations, and all client specific variables precisely

— Insert and test Google review links for each client before go-live confirmation

— Conduct complete end-to-end testing of every automation before any client account goes live

— Send professional onboarding summary to every new client within 24 hours of setup completion

— Connect and verify Google Business Profile integration for each client during onboarding

Automation and Workflow Management

— Build, test, and optimize GoHighLevel workflows at an advanced level including complex branching logic

— Manage missed call text-back automations, after hours automations, and inbound SMS welcome flows

— Operate review request automation with positive and negative gating and routing for all clients

— Manage appointment reminder sequences including 24-hour, 1-hour, and no-show follow-up workflows

— Build and deploy quarterly reactivation campaigns against segmented past customer lists

— Maintain and optimize multi-touch
 and SMS follow-up sequences for all clients

— Monitor and maintain our 72-hour response rate tracking architecture and KPI counter logic

— Build new workflows and automations as our service offerings expand into new verticals

Lead Generation and Outreach Support

— Build and manage 
 prospect lists for cold outreach campaigns across multiple industries

— Load and monitor cold
 sequences inside GoHighLevel for prospect pipeline management

— Monitor all prospect reply inboxes and flag qualified responses within 2 hours every business day

— Send pre-qualification
s to interested prospects using approved templates immediately upon reply

— Move prospects through pipeline stages accurately and maintain clean CRM data at all times

— Support
 Lead Ads integration and monitor lead flow into GoHighLevel pipelines

— Support Google Local Services Ads lead flow monitoring and pipeline management

— Manage Nextdoor business presence and community engagement for applicable clients

Reporting and Client Retention

— Pull complete performance data from GoHighLevel for every client account by the 1st of each month

— Build detailed monthly performance reports using our standard template by the 3rd of each month

— Deliver all approved monthly reports to clients by the 5th of each month without exception

— Maintain the custom reporting dashboard for every client account with accurate KPI data at all times

— Track and report all eight core metrics — total calls received, missed calls captured, leads responded within 72 hours, appointments booked, 72-hour response rate, reviews requested, reviews received, and current Google rating

— Identify client performance trends and surface optimization opportunities proactively

— Prepare monthly check-in call briefing notes for the founder before every client call

Technology and Integration Management

— Manage GoHighLevel integrations with Google Business Profile,
 Ads, Stripe, and Twilio

— Build and maintain Zapier workflows connecting GoHighLevel with client job management software including ServiceTitan, Jobber, and Housecall Pro

— Configure and test webhook integrations between GoHighLevel and third party platforms

— Troubleshoot API and integration failures quickly and independently

— Stay current with GoHighLevel platform updates, new features, and best practices

— Evaluate and recommend new GoHighLevel features or third party integrations that enhance our service

— Document all system architecture, integration logic, and workflow structures for internal reference

Quality Assurance and Compliance

— Complete the post-clone checklist for every new client account with sign-off before go-live

— Conduct weekly automation health checks across all client accounts without exception

— Maintain full TCPA compliance for all SMS automations across all client accounts at all times

— Ensure A2P 10DLC registration is current and compliant for all SMS sending numbers

— Document and maintain standard operating procedures for all repetitive operational tasks

— Flag any compliance risks, platform issues, or client concerns to the founder immediately



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS — NON-NEGOTIABLE

Applications that do not meet these requirements will not be considered. We are not training beginners. We are hiring an expert.

GoHighLevel Experience

— Minimum 3 years of hands-on GoHighLevel experience not including time spent only watching tutorials

— Must have worked directly with a GoHighLevel agency or reseller managing multiple client sub-accounts simultaneously

— Deep expert level knowledge of GoHighLevel SaaS mode and agency sub-account architecture

— Expert level workflow and automation builder — must be able to build complex branching logic without assistance

— Expert level snapshot creation and management — must build, clone, and troubleshoot snapshots independently

— Complete mastery of Twilio integration inside GoHighLevel including number provisioning, SMS configuration, and troubleshooting

— Completed A2P 10DLC registration for at least two GoHighLevel agency clients previously

— Expert level pipeline management and CRM configuration

— Advanced GoHighLevel reporting and custom dashboard configuration experience

— Experience with GoHighLevel calendar and appointment automation systems

— Ability to troubleshoot any GoHighLevel issue independently without escalating basic problems

Technical Platform Experience

— 
 — prospect list building, filtering, and export experience required

— Stripe — payment configuration and GoHighLevel Stripe integration experience required

— Zapier — ability to build and maintain multi-step zaps connecting GoHighLevel to external platforms

—
 Business Manager and
 Lead Ads integration with 
 required

— Google Business Profile management and GoHighLevel GBP integration experience required

— Google Ads or Google Local Services Ads experience strongly preferred

— ServiceTitan, Jobber, or Housecall Pro integration experience strongly preferred

Professional Requirements

— Exceptional written English communication skills — you communicate directly with clients and the founder daily

— Available to work US Central Time business hours — 8am to 5pm Monday through Friday minimum

— Ability to respond to urgent client issues outside business hours when necessary

— Extremely detail-oriented — zero tolerance for errors in any client-facing work

— Proactive problem-solver who identifies and resolves issues before being asked

— Strong ability to manage multiple client accounts simultaneously without dropping anything

— Experience using Loom or similar screen recording tools for documentation and client communication

— Reliable high-speed internet — minimum 25 Mbps upload and download

— Dedicated professional workspace with minimal background noise



HIGHLY PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

— Experience building GoHighLevel systems specifically for trades businesses — HVAC, roofing, plumbing, electrical, or security companies

— Experience managing GoHighLevel agencies with 10 or more active client sub-accounts simultaneously

— GoHighLevel certification or documented advanced training completion

— Experience building GoHighLevel white label configurations for agency reselling

— Experience with
 Ads campaign creation and optimization beyond just lead flow management

— Experience with Google Local Services Ads setup and the Google Guaranteed verification process

— SEO and Google Business Profile optimization experience with documented ranking results

— Experience with Nextdoor Business advertising platform

— Basic HTML and CSS knowledge for landing page customization inside GoHighLevel

— Experience with DataAxle, Melissa Data, or similar consumer data providers for targeted list building

— Prior experience supporting an agency scaling from 5 clients to 20 plus clients

— Experience creating standard operating procedure documentation for agency operations

— Experience training or supervising junior GoHighLevel operators or virtual assistants

title: B2B Outreach & Lead Qualification Specialist (EU / US Market)
description:
B2B Outreach & Lead Qualification Specialist (EU / US Market)

Front-End Qualification Role – Outcome Driven



About Us:

We are a China-based manufacturer specializing in:

Hydration vests

Running backpacks

Sports & travel bags

OEM / ODM development for EU and US brands



Our target clients are mid-sized outdoor brands and performance-focused e-commerce companies.



We are building a structured outbound system and are looking for a professional who can strengthen the front-end of our sales pipeline.



Your responsibility is to:

Identify, evaluate, and qualify companies with real OEM sourcing potential, and move them into our internal sales pipeline. 

Invite them to connect with us on business, they can visit our company, or have a video conference to learn more about our company.

Video meetings are a tool — not the final objective.

The true objective is contributing qualified prospects into a structured conversion process.



Core Mission?

You are the first filter of our business development system.

Your work protects our team’s time and increases closing efficiency by ensuring that only suitable prospects move forward.



Full Workflow Responsibility

1. Target Selection

You will identify companies that match our Ideal Customer Profile:

Mid-sized EU / US brands

Product-driven businesses

Companies with product development capacity



Businesses likely to require OEM manufacturing



You will avoid retailers, trading-only companies, or non-relevant entities.



2. Decision-Maker Mapping

You will identify relevant roles such as:

Head of Product

Product Manager

Sourcing / Procurement Manager

Founder / Brand Owner



You are expected to understand decision-making structure and influence hierarchy.



3. Structured Outreach

You will conduct professional outreach through:


LinkedIn

The objective is not aggressive selling, but structured engagement to determine potential interest.



4. Qualification Filtering

Before moving to a meeting stage, you must confirm:

The company fits our target segment

There is potential sourcing or development interest

The contact has decision influence

The company is open to supplier conversations

If the above criteria are not met, the prospect does not proceed.



5. Qualified Handover

Once a prospect is properly qualified:

Schedule a video meeting

Provide a short background summary

Transfer the opportunity to our product team



Your responsibility ends at structured handover.



How Success Is Measured?

We do NOT measure success by number of
s sent.

We do NOT measure success by number of meetings alone.



We measure:

Prospect quality

Qualification accuracy

Meeting-to-next-stage conversion rate

Contribution to pipeline progression

Low-quality meetings have no value.



Quality and fit matter more than volume.

title: Quality Control Photo Editor (Remote) — Real Estate Photo Editing
description:
*NEVER GET BURNT OUT WORKING AGAIN!*

We’re a fun, supportive company that actually has your back!

Apply and come see why every employee we’ve hired never wants to leave us



If you want a steady role where your attention to detail actually matters, Dream Home Shots is hiring a Quality Control Photo Editor to be the final set of eyes on our AI-edited photos before they go to clients.



Schedule (must match exactly)

-------------------------------------------

Monday – Saturday, 7:30 PM–11:30 PM EST

(Tuesday – Sunday, 8:30 AM–12:30 PM PHT)

About the Role:

----------------------

We’re a busy real estate media company switching to AI editing. We’re looking for someone with a reliable, time-efficient work ethic who is very detail-oriented and has strong English reading/writing skills.

Your job will be to quality control all photo edits we run through our AI editing software and make corrections when needed.



In this role you will:

Required skills:

- Experience with real estate photo editing



Daily workflow:

----------------------

- 7:30 PM: Pull completed AI photo edits

- Quality control against photographer notes and raw exposures

- Fix color/lighting consistency, lens corrections, AI artifacts

- Basic item removal in Photoshop

- Upload to the delivery platform

- End-of-shift handoff message for the AM team if anything is pending



How to Apply:

---------------------

If you are detail-oriented, professional, and excited to support a growing company, we’d love to hear from you! ????



Please provide EVERYTHING we ask for to be considered.

Send an
 to 
 with the subject:

“Application - Quality Control Photo Editor”



Include:

------------

- Your portfolio (before and after examples preferred)

- Your updated resume

- A short voice or video recording (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining your editing experience

- Internet speed and computer specs

- A picture of a pink duck





Important:

----------------

- Do not apply if you are not okay with the hours of operation.

- If you do not send a portfolio, your application will not be reviewed.

title: Cold Call Manager / QA-QC & Lead Qualification Manager (Real Estate) – Full-Time
description:
Cold Call Manager / QA-QC & Lead Qualification Manager (Real Estate) – Full-Time



Job Type

Full-Time (Remote / Virtual)

Industry: Real Estate Acquisitions / Lead Generation



Position Overview



We are hiring a full-time Cold Call Manager to oversee our real estate cold-calling operation, manage caller performance, handle QA/QC, and improve lead qualification quality before leads are passed to acquisitions.



This role requires someone who is strong at listening to calls, understanding tone, coaching callers, and identifying where deals are being missed — especially on calls marked as “unqualified” that may actually deserve follow-up.



The ideal candidate has hands-on experience with ReadyModeIQ (ReadyMode), understands dialer management, and knows how to improve both team output and lead quality in a real estate environment.



Core Responsibilities



1) Cold Caller Team Management (Daily)

-Manage and supervise cold callers (full-time / part-time / VA team)

-Track daily performance metrics (dials, connects, conversations, outcomes, appointments)

-Ensure callers followscript, workflow, and disposition standards

-Run daily check-ins, feedback sessions, and performance huddles

-Monitor attendance, consistency, and productivity

-Assign call lists and priorities based on campaign goals

-Payroll



2) QA/QC (Quality Assurance / Quality Control)

-Review and score call recordings for:

-Script adherence

-Professionalism

-Clarity

-Confidence

-Tone and communication style

-Objection handling

-Accuracy of dispositions / call outcomes

-Provide coaching feedback to improve conversion and caller effectiveness

-Identify weak patterns (rushing, poor tone, bad transitions, missed qualifying questions, etc.)

-Maintain and improve QA scorecards and call standards

-Audit CRM notes/tags for accuracy and completeness



3) Unqualified Lead Call Review (Critical)

-Listen to calls marked as “unqualified” to verify whether they were truly unqualified

-Catch missed opportunities caused by:

-Poor caller tone

-Weak follow-up questions

-Incorrect dispositioning

-Failure to build rapport

-Missed seller motivation signals

-Reclassify leads when needed (nurture / warm / follow-up / manager review)

-Coach callers on how to better handle similar situations going forward

-Build a feedback loop to reduce false disqualifications and improve lead quality



4) Lead Qualification & Handoff Control

-Review and qualify leads before they are sent to acquisitions

-Confirm key data points such as:

-Property address

-Seller / decision-maker contact info

-Motivation

-Timeline

-Property condition (if available)

-Price expectation / asking range (if available)

-Occupancy / vacancy

-Best callback time / next step

-Organize leads by status (hot / warm / nurture / disqualified)

-Make manager-level follow-up qualification calls when needed

-Ensure acquisitions receives clean, accurate, actionable lead handoffs



5) ReadyModeIQ / Dialer Management

-Manage and monitor ReadyModeIQ / ReadyMode dialer operations

-Ensure campaigns, caller sessions, and workflows are running correctly

-Troubleshoot dialer-related issues (call flow, agent statuses, campaign setup, etc.)

-Help maintain dialing efficiency while preserving call quality

-Support list loading / campaign organization (as needed)

-Coordinate with leadership on dialing strategy, productivity, and performance optimization



6) Training, Coaching & Process Improvement

-Train new callers on script, tone, qualification, dispositions, and CRM process

-Run roleplays focused on rapport, objection handling, and confidence

-Coach callers on how they sound, not just what they say

-Improve call scripts and qualification flow based on call review trends

-Maintain SOPs for call handling, QA, and lead handoff standards



Required Qualifications



-Proven experience managing cold callers / appointment setters / inside sales teams

-Experience in real estate lead generation (investor, wholesale, acquisitions, brokerage, etc.)

-Strong experience with QA/QC call review and coaching

-Strong ability to evaluate tone, communication style, and seller interaction quality

-Experience reviewing calls marked “unqualified” and identifying missed opportunities

-Hands-on experience with ReadyModeIQ / ReadyMode

-Experience managing a dialer and monitoring caller performance

-Strong understanding of lead qualification and seller motivation

-Strong organization, follow-through, and accountability management

-Experience with CRM systems and accurate lead dispositioning



Preferred Qualifications (Strong Plus)



-Experience in real estate investing (wholesale, fix & flip, novation, seller finance, etc.)

-Experience managing remote teams / overseas callers / VAs

-Experience building QA scorecards and coaching systems

-Familiarity with list stacking, skip tracing, and campaign segmentation

-Ability to pull insights from call recordings and improve scripts/process quickly



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)



-Team call consistency and productivity

-Call quality scores (QA/QC)

-Tone/communication improvement across callers

-Lead qualification accuracy

-Reduction in false “unqualified” dispositions

-Number of qualified leads passed to acquisitions

-CRM note/tag accuracy

-Caller coaching progress and performance improvement

-Dialer uptime / campaign efficiency (ReadyModeIQ)



What Success Looks Like in This Role



-Callers sound professional, confident, and consistent

-Fewer good leads are lost due to poor tone or bad qualification

-“Unqualified” leads are properly audited and corrected when needed

-Acquisitions receives stronger, cleaner lead handoffs

-QA/QC and dialer management are organized, consistent, and scalable



Schedule / Availability



-Full-time remote role

-Must be available during core calling hours for target markets

-Daily communication with leadership and acquisitions team required

-Fast response time for caller issues, dialer problems, and lead review needs



Compensation (Example Language)



Compensation based on experience and results. Can include:

-Base salary or hourly (full-time)

-Performance incentives tied to:

-Team qualified leads

-QA performance

-Lead quality improvement

-Reduction in bad / missed lead dispositions

title: Senior Lending Intelligence & Bank Relationship Specialist (Philippines Only – Remote)
description:
READ FIRST – Not a Basic VA Role



We are hiring someone in the Philippines with real lending experience and real banking connections.



This role is for someone who has:

 • Worked inside a bank, credit union, lending company, or broker office (USA)

 • Built relationships with branch managers, relationship managers, or business banking reps

 • Seen high-limit approvals happen firsthand

 • Wants long-term stability, growth, and performance-based income



If you have experience working with banks like Chase, Fifth Third, or similar U.S. institutions — especially handling business credit cards or business lines of credit — this opportunity is for you.



?



What We Are Looking For



We want someone who:

 • Has access to or relationships with branch managers or business banking representatives

 • Understands how approvals are influenced for:

 • $50K+ business credit cards

 • $75K–$100K business lines of credit

 • High-limit unsecured funding

 • Has firsthand knowledge of approval behavior (not theory)



Examples of the types of approvals we are targeting:

 • $50,000+ business credit cards

 • $100,000 business lines of credit

 • High-limit unsecured credit through relationship banking



If you have worked around these approvals, we want to speak with you.

Compensation Structure



This is not just a fixed salary role.



You will receive:

 • Competitive base pay

 • Commissions when clients get approved

 • Large bonuses when clients secure high funding amounts

 • Long-term growth opportunity



This position is designed for someone who wants a professional home — a place to grow, be valued, and build something long-term.



If you perform well and help drive approvals, your income grows with it.



Responsibilities

 • Document real lender approval patterns based on your experience

 • Help identify which banks are currently approving higher limits

 • Leverage relationships with bank reps or branch managers when appropriate

 • Track approval tendencies by:

 • Credit score

 • Income

 • Business revenue

 • Bank deposits

 • Assist in structuring borrower profiles to increase approval odds

 • Build and maintain an internal lender intelligence database



Required Background (Must Have At Least One)

 • Former Bank Loan Processor

 • Former Loan Underwriter

 • Business Banking Assistant

 • Relationship Manager Support Staff

 • Lending Operations Staff

 • Broker Submission Manager



We are not hiring entry-level virtual assistants for this role.



Major Advantage (Priority Consideration)

You will receive priority if you:

 • Have direct contact with business banking reps

 • Have access to branch managers

 • Previously assisted with high-limit approvals

 • Worked inside U.S.-based banks or credit unions

 • Can explain how business lines of credit are actually approved



Screening Questions (Required – Be Specific)

 1. Have you worked directly with branch managers or relationship managers? Explain your role.

 2. What is the highest business credit card limit you personally saw approved?

 3. What borrower profile typically qualifies for $50K+ business credit cards?

 4. What does a borrower need to qualify for a $75K–$100K line of credit?

 5. Do you currently maintain any banking contacts?



Generic answers will not be considered.

How to Apply



Submit:

 • Your resume

 • Answers to all screening questions

 • Your WhatsApp number

 • Your
 address



Applications missing any of the above will not be reviewed.

Final Note



We are building a serious funding operation. This role is for experienced professionals who understand how approvals truly work and want to grow with a long-term team.



If you have real insider knowledge and real banking relationships, this opportunity can be highly rewarding.

title: Estimator
description:
We are seeking for an Estimator in the Facility Services / Building Maintenance industry.



We are looking for someone who truly understands building maintenance and field services — not just someone strong in spreadsheets.



This role requires practical knowledge of services like janitorial, landscaping, pest control, exterior cleaning, and general facility maintenance. You should understand how long jobs actually take, what materials are required, how crews operate, and what can go wrong on-site.



In simple terms — you will review scopes, visit site details (virtually), and build realistic, profitable quotes based on real operational experience.



If you’ve worked in building maintenance, managed crews, or priced service contracts before, this role is for you.



What You’ll Really Be Doing:

Reviewing & Understanding Scope

Read RFPs, walkthrough notes, site plans, and service requirements.

Ask smart questions about access, risks, service frequency, and materials needed.

Translate real-world site conditions into labor and material estimates.

Building Accurate Estimates

Calculate labor hours, material quantities, equipment needs, and subcontractor costs.

Factor in travel time, route density, mobilization, and overhead.

Ensure pricing meets company margin targets.

Offer service options (frequency changes, bundled services, seasonal pricing).



Supporting Sales & Operations

Work closely with Sales to build competitive proposals.

Validate crew capacity and route feasibility with Operations.

Ensure pricing reflects how work is actually performed in the field.

Improving Pricing Accuracy

Maintain cost libraries and production rates.

Review actual job performance vs. estimates and adjust future pricing.

Help refine assumptions based on real job outcomes.



Government & Public Bids

Monitor procurement portals for opportunities.

Track deadlines and pre-bid meetings.

What We’re Really Looking For:

5 years of experience in estimating within building maintenance or facility services.

OR strong field experience (operations, supervisor, or service manager) with exposure to pricing and contracts.

Experience in janitorial, landscaping, pest control, pool care, exterior cleaning, or similar industries.

Ability to read RFPs, site plans, and service specifications.

Strong understanding of labor production rates and material usage.

Comfortable using spreadsheets for pricing models.

Solid business math and margin understanding.

Practical mindset — you price based on how work really happens, not just theory.



Requirements:

Updated Resume/CV.

Reliable internet connection and personal computer.

Strong attention to detail.

Ability to collaborate with Sales and Operations teams.





Requirements:

Updated Resume/CV.

Ability to work remotely with consistent availability during Pacific Time business hours.

Reliable internet connection and personal computer.

UPS/battery backup for work continuity during power interruptions.



Benefits:

Competitive salary with performance-based bonuses.

Remote work flexibility

Career development in a high-integrity, quality-driven team.

HMO coverage for the employee and immediate family members.



Join our team now and be part of the top 1% talent in the Philippines!

description:
You will receive raw inputs from our team and handle everything from there. This includes editing listing photos and short-form videos for Instagram Reels,

, and LinkedIn, and be comfortable with the visual and written expectations of each platform.



Our agents will supply you with raw content — photos, video clips, key property details, and any specific messaging priorities. From there, you are responsible for producing finished posts and getting them scheduled on time.



To be considered for this role, please submit at least three social media posts or Reels you have created for a previous client or employer. In addition, we ask that you complete a short skills test as part of the application process. We will provide you with a listing photo set and a short video clip and ask you to produce one finished Instagram feed post and one Reel edit. This gives us a clear picture of your creative skills and workflow.

title: Amazon Online Arbitrage VA
description:
In late last year we began selling on Amazon and have already seen tremendous growth. Because of this, we want to bring on help to help in daily tasks and continue growing the business!



No Amazon experience is required, but Pattern wholesale experience is preferred! We will teach you everything.



We're specifically looking for someone to source amazon products through online arbitrage. Our minimum weekly criteria is 15-20 quality leads that we can purchase.



Before we hire you, you're required to complete a 3 day trial phase. During this phase you will be paid $1.50 per hour and after the trial phase, we will evaluate and make our hiring decision. After the initial phase your wage will be increased to $3 dollars per hour. After 180 days we will re-evaluate your performance and you will be considered for a raise of your base pay. We want to provide you an opportunity for long-term growth and give you a chance to be rewarded for hard work, with the possibility of managing other VAs as you become more senior.



Bonuses are available on a monthly basis with more leads and more profit leading to a greater bonus. To ensure you're fully reading this, please put Arbitrage Expert in your subject line. Everything will be explained to you during our initial call.



Training will be frequent covering new sourcing methods, ways to analyze data, and you will receive feedback on your work. Furthermore, your performance and hours will be tracked with Hubstaff.



In your application please provide your Teams information or your whatsapp information, so I can contact you and schedule a call to review expectations and criteria.

title: U.S. Tax Preparer (Seasonal Part-Time ? Year-Round Contractor)
description:
I am seeking an experienced U.S. Tax Preparer to assist with preparation of individual and business tax returns for a boutique U.S. tax practice. The client base includes individuals with international elements and small businesses. Accuracy, confidentiality, and reliability are non-negotiable.



This is not an entry-level bookkeeping role. You must have real experience preparing U.S. federal income tax returns.



Required Experience



You must have hands-on experience preparing the following:



Individual Returns



Form 1040



Form 2555 (Foreign Earned Income Exclusion)



Form 1116 (Foreign Tax Credit)



Form 5471



Form 5472



Form 8938



Schedule C



Schedule D



Schedule E



Form 1040-NR



Business Returns



Form 1065



Form 1120



Form 1120S



You should understand:



Foreign reporting requirements (FBAR familiarity is a plus)



Entity structures (S-corp vs partnership vs C-corp)



Basis tracking and capital accounts



K-1 preparation and reconciliation



If you have not prepared these forms independently, do not apply.



Software Requirements



Preferred experience with:



TaxACT Professional (primary software used)



ATX Tax Software



You must be comfortable learning and working within structured tax workflows and using secure document-sharing systems.



Work Structure

January–April (Tax Season)



Part-time, consistent weekly hours



Ability to meet strict U.S. filing deadlines



Availability for communication during limited overlap with U.S. Eastern Time



May–December



Contractor basis



Ongoing but lighter workload



Project-based assignments



This role is long-term for the right candidate.



Responsibilities



Prepare accurate draft tax returns based on provided client documentation



Identify missing information and communicate clearly what is required



Follow written standard operating procedures



Maintain organized digital workpapers



Flag technical issues or uncertainties instead of guessing



Meet internal deadlines consistently



All returns will be reviewed before filing. Attention to detail is critical.



Required Skills



Strong understanding of U.S. federal income tax law



Excellent English written communication



High attention to detail



Ability to follow instructions precisely



Ability to work independently without constant supervision



Strict confidentiality and professionalism



Preferred Qualifications



Prior experience working with a U.S. CPA or tax firm



PTIN (if applicable)



Familiarity with international tax issues



Experience handling clients with foreign income or foreign corporations



Compensation



Competitive hourly rate based on experience



Rate will reflect demonstrated competence, not claimed experience



Application Instructions



To be considered, please include:



A summary of your direct experience with each of the required forms listed above.



The tax software you have used and for how many years.



Your hourly rate expectation.



Your availability from January through April (hours per week).



A brief description of the most complex U.S. tax return you have prepared.



Applications that do not address these five items will not be reviewed.



This position requires precision, discipline, and accountability. If you take shortcuts or guess when unsure, this role will not be a fit. If you are technically strong and dependable, this can become a stable, long-term engagement.

title: Executive Assistant (Executive-Level Remote Specialist)
description:
Executive Assistant (Executive-Level Remote Specialist)

Part-Time | Executive Tier | 9am-1pm GMT (UK Time) | Pay:  TBD



OVERVIEW

We are seeking an experienced Executive Assistant to provide high-level operational, administrative, and marketing support as our training and consultancy business continues to grow. The role is designed for a highly capable assistant who can take ownership of day-to-day operations, streamline workflows, and help manage long sales cycles, complex client deliverables, and a growing pipeline of opportunities.



The ideal candidate is proactive, organised, commercially aware, and comfortable supporting a founder who works across virtual training delivery, in-person sessions, business development, and long-term consulting engagements.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

-Executive Support & Operations

Manage the Founder’s calendar, meetings, travel arrangements, and day-to-day schedule.



-Coordinate virtual and in-person training sessions, ensuring the executive is fully prepared for each delivery block (some lasting up to 14 weeks).



-Handle inbox management, triaging
s and drafting responses where appropriate.



-Work directly with the Founder to identify the key areas in his business that are taking his time, and build and execute a plan to take them over, freeing up the Founder to focus on solving client problems.



-Maintain oversight of ongoing client deliverables, follow-ups, and deadlines.



-Prepare documents, presentations, proposals, and reports as required.



-Keep the Founder organised, focused, and operating efficiently during heavy workload periods.



-Business Development Support

CRM management not as important, as this is the account director’s responsibility.

Track long sales cycles (12-18 months) and maintain an organised pipeline.



-Follow up with prospects, manage CRM data, and ensure nothing slips through the cracks.



-Assist in preparing bids, proposals, and supporting documentation.



-Support research into new revenue streams, sectors, and partnership opportunities.

-Marketing & Systems Support. Assist with marketing administration ahead of the new website launch.



-Organise and utilise the Founder’s extensive internal data to support marketing campaigns.



-Support creation and coordination of
 marketing campaigns and newsletters.



-Help build and maintain operational systems, SOPs, and workflow processes.



-Coordinate tasks with external marketing or web development partners where needed.



-Client & Project Support. Communicate with clients around schedules, follow-ups, and document needs.



-Help ensure high-quality service delivery by managing logistics, timelines, and expectations.



-Support onboarding and coordination of contractors, part-time workers, or partners.



ROLE REQUIREMENTS

-At least FIVE (5) years of experience as an Executive Assistant or Operations Assistant.

-Experience supporting founders, consultants, or senior executives.

-Strong organisational skills with the ability to manage multiple competing priorities.

-Excellent written and spoken English.

-Highly proactive, able to anticipate needs and solve problems independently.

-Confident in managing long sales cycles, CRM tools, pipelines, and follow-ups.

-Experience in B2B or professional services marketing is highly desirable.

-Comfortable supporting a business with fluctuating timelines, tight deadlines, and periods of intense delivery.



PERSONAL ATTRIBUTES

-Calm, composed, and able to support an executive under pressure.

-Detail-oriented with strong follow-through.

-Commercially minded and able to understand business priorities quickly.

-Structured, systematic, and process-driven.

-Loyal, trustworthy, and able to handle confidential information responsibly.



SUCCESS INDICATORS

-The Founder’s calendar, inbox, and workload become structured and manageable.

-Sales pipeline and client follow-ups are consistently maintained.

-Administrative and operational bottlenecks are removed.

-Marketing activity (particularly
 marketing and campaigns) becomes consistent.

-Systems and processes are in place to reduce overwhelm and support growth.

-The Founder gains back significant time each week, allowing him to focus on growth, consulting, and client delivery.



HOW TO APPLY:  

Please fill out this form: 
 (mostly Multiple choice)



Note: Sending only a message here without completing the form will NOT be considered.



I look forward to reviewing your profiles!

title: Ads Manager
description:
Meta Ads Manager (Product Testing) — The Business Builders (Sydney Time)

Remote (Philippines-based) | Full-time | Sydney (AEST) hours | Paid holidays



We’re hiring a killer Meta Ads Manager who loves one thing:

- launching product tests fast

- finding winners

- killing losers ruthlessly



We run 
 — we build and scale eCommerce stores for clients, and we’re obsessed with performance. If you’re the type who lives inside Ads Manager, makes clean decisions from data, and can handle volume, you’ll fit right in.



What We Do (and why it’s fun)

- We launch and test products constantly to find winners, then we roll those winners into client stores and scale them hard.

- You won’t be stuck “managing one brand forever.”

- You’ll be part of a system that tests, learns, and moves FAST.

- If you want a role where your skills directly create wins every week — this is it.



Your Mission

- Launch daily product tests (Meta)

- Monitor performance + metrics hourly/daily

- Kill losers early using clear rules

- Identify winners and push them further

- Report results clearly to the team

- Keep accounts clean, organized, and scalable



You’re a Fit If You…

- Have managed real eCommerce ad accounts (not theory)

- Know how to test products quickly (ABO/CBO)

- Can read the data and make decisions without emotions

- Understand how to work with multiple creatives + angles

- Are consistent, reliable, and can work Sydney hours



What You’ll Be Managing

- High-volume product testing

- Multiple stores / multiple tests per week

- Fast creative iteration

- Clear performance benchmarks

- A team that moves quickly and backs you up



Work Setup

- Full-time

- Sydney (AEST) aligned hours

- Remote (Philippines-based)

- Paid holidays

- Stable long-term role for the right person



Pay

Competitive PH-based salary (based on experience) + room to grow quickly when you perform.



**REQUIRED TO APPLY: LOOM PROOF (Non-Negotiable)**

To apply, you must send a LOOM video showing a current eCommerce client/account you are managing.

Your LOOM must show:



- Proof you have access (your name/email visible in BM/Ads Manager access is fine)

- Campaign view showing active campaigns

- Key metrics (last 7 days + last 30 days):

- Spend

- Purchases

- CPA / Cost per Purchase

- ROAS

- CTR

- CPC

- A product test you launched (structure + budgets + creatives)

- A “kill losers” example (show paused ads + explain why)

- (Bonus) Scaling example if available

- 5–12 minutes



You may blur store name if needed

No demo accounts / no fake dashboards



*Also answer these (in writing)*

- What’s your product testing structure (ABO/CBO, budgets, creatives, targeting)?

- What are your kill rules (spend thresholds + key metrics)?

- How many product tests can you launch per day/week?

- What’s your strongest result ever in eCommerce ads (CPA/ROAS/spend)?



How to Apply

Send:

- Your LOOM link

- Your written answers

- Your best eCommerce results





If you’re a real operator and not just “an ads person,” we want you.

Oversee the transition from generic white-label items to differentiated private-label assets with unique selling propositions (USP) that proactively address buyer objections.

Technical Proficiency & Prompting: Leverage modern AI tools (Gemini, Claude) through advanced prompt engineering to scout global databases, identify niche manufacturers, and automate supplier vetting against strict product requirements. Utilize AI to bridge communication gaps with international partners, draft high-precision RFQs, and synthesize complex bulk pricing spreadsheets using Slack and Drive to ensure rapid lead times and optimal inventory turnover.

title: Crypto YouTube Video Editor
description:
[Hiring] Video Editor for Crypto Exchange Tutorials



We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented video editor to join our team for a long-term collaboration. Your primary role will be creating and editing instructional "how-to" videos and sign-up guides.



What You Will Do:



1. Routine Tutorial Editing (Primary Role)



Volume: 5 to 7 videos per week.



Rate: $10 per video.



Average Length: Approximately 4 minutes per video.



Task: We will provide you with raw footage and a reference video. You will be responsible for generating US-English voiceovers using TTS (Text-to-Speech), perfectly syncing the audio with the video, and adding visual elements like highlight boxes and arrows for clarity.



2. Full Walkthrough Creation (Occasional)



Volume: Roughly once a quarter.



Rate: $25 per video.



Task: When a new platform or exchange is introduced, you will record the entire sign-up process from scratch on your end, edit it, and deliver the final polished video.



Who We Are Looking For:



TTS Expert: You must be proficient in using ElevenLabs to generate natural-sounding, US-English voiceovers and capable of reviewing your own audio quality.



Eagle-Eyed Detail: Perfect audio-to-video synchronization is critical. We need someone who can eliminate awkward pauses and ensure natural pronunciation.



Consistency: You are comfortable handling repetitive editing workflows while maintaining a high standard of quality.



Proven Experience: You must have past experience editing instructional or tutorial videos.



How to Apply (Paid Trial Project):

To ensure we are a good fit, shortlisted candidates will be asked to complete a paid test project ($15). You will watch a reference video we provide and create a sample video with a very similar style and feel to submit to us. Based on this test, we will d
 on moving forward with a long-term partnership.



To apply, please share the links to your previous tutorial or guide video edits.

title: Full-Time Social Media Manager & Copywriter (Instagram & Facebook) - Wellness/Yoga Niche
description:
We are looking for a creative, reliable, and highly detail-oriented Full-Time Social Media Manager & Copywriter to join the team of a Kundalini Yoga instructor who is expanding her online business.



Our target audience is NOT the typical 20-something in yoga leggings. Our audience consists of older women who may not be in perfect physical shape. They are women who feel disconnected, like they are just "going through the motions" of life, and are seeking a grounded sense of self. Our social media content and copy must reflect this mature, empathetic, and welcoming tone.



We are looking for a proactive team player who brings their own creative ideas to the table to help grow engagement and drive lead generation within this specific demographic.



Scope of Work & Responsibilities:

- Content Creation: Design visually appealing, accessible graphics, carousels, and quote cards using Canva that resonate with an older, mature audience.



- Copywriting: Write engaging, authentic, and empathetic captions. (You are welcome to use AI tools to assist, but you must add your own creative input and ensure the tone matches our grounded, mature brand voice).



- Posting Schedule: Batch create and schedule content to go out 5 times a week on both Instagram and
.



- Analytics & Strategy: Track backend analytics (reach, engagement, clicks) and make data-driven suggestions on how we can improve our content.



Communication: 

Maintain reliable, daily communication with the team.



Requirements:

- Proven experience growing Instagram and
 accounts.

- Strong graphic design skills using Canva.

- Excellent English copywriting skills with a sharp eye for detail and the ability to write in an empathetic, mature tone.

- Highly organised and capable of batch-creating content in advance.

- An interest in wellness, personal development, or spirituality is a huge plus!



How to Apply (Please read carefully):?

- We are looking for someone with exceptional attention to detail. 

- To apply, please send an
 with your cover letter.

- Please note: Shortlisted candidates must be willing to complete a brief test task so we can gauge your design style, copywriting, and ability to capture Candace's brand voice.



- In your application, you MUST include the following:



*Make the subject line of your
 exactly: "Kundalini Social Media Manager - [Insert Your Favorite Color]"*



*State your expected full-time monthly salary/rate in USD.*



*Provide links to exactly THREE (3) examples of social media posts (image + caption) that you have created for past clients. Do not send a link to a general portfolio; pick your best three.*



*Tell us the name of one wellness, fitness, or lifestyle brand/influencer you admire on social media and briefly explain why you like their content.*



Applications that do not follow these exact instructions will be automatically deleted.

description:

Stay ahead of trends in video marketing, storytelling, and social media best practices for e-commerce brands.

Qualifications:

Familiarity with Amazon product video guidelines and best practices.

Basic skills in color grading, lighting correction, and sound mixing.

About Us:



Skin Research Institute is a fast-growing e-commerce brand dedicated to creating high-quality beauty and wellness products. Our marketing team thrives on delivering compelling, high-performing video content that resonates with our audience and drives sales.

title: Maintenance Coordinator - Bilingual
description:
PSB (Pro Services Boston) and Green Ocean Property Management are integrated maintenance + property management teams serving the Greater Boston market. We manage multifamily, single-family, and HOA assets and run an in-house service operation focused on speed, quality, and clear communication.



Role Overview:

The Maintenance Coordinator is the command center for all work orders: intake, triage, scheduling, vendor coordination, tenant communications, and close-out. You’ll prioritize urgent issues, keep preventive maintenance on cadence, and drive down cycle times. This is a performance role with clear SLAs, daily accountability rhythms, and growth into senior coordination/ops leadership.



Core Responsibilities:

Work Order Intake & Triage

Receive requests via portal/phone/email; log with complete scope, photos, access info, and priority tag.

Classify by Priority (P0–P3) and building/owner rules; verify warranty/recall/recurring issues.

Pre-diagnose to reduce truck rolls (simple resets, filter sizes, breaker checks, shutoff guidance).

Scheduling & Dispatch

Assign to the right vendor/tech based on trade, SLA, geography, availability, and cost.

Build and update daily/weekly schedules; confirm tenant access, lockbox codes, pet/alarms, parking.

Create and track Not-to-Exceed (NTE) amounts; obtain approvals when required.

Vendor Management

Coordinate licensed vendors (HVAC, plumbing, electrical, appliance, roofing, etc.).

Ensure COI/W-9/licenses are current; validate arrival/completion, photo proof, and written diagnosis.

Request quotes for >NTE jobs; compare scope/price; route to approval.

Tenant & Owner Communication

Provide clear ETAs, prep steps (water shutoff, clearing access), and progress updates.

Set expectations for parts lead times and follow-ups; confirm satisfaction at completion.

Escalate sensitively when work impacts health/safety or habitability.

Preventive Maintenance (PM)

Maintain seasonal PM calendars (boilers/furnaces, gutters, dryer vents, smoke/CO checks, filter changes).

Batch/schedule PMs to minimize tenant disruption and travel time; track completion.

Invoicing & Close-Out

Ensure work orders have diagnosis, materials, labor, before/after photos, and time stamps.

Match invoices to WOs, verify against NTE, route exceptions, and submit to accounting the same day.

Emergencies & After-Hours Coordination

Follow the P0/P1 emergency SOP (gas/water/electrical hazards, no-heat, lockouts).

Coordinate on-call vendors, city services, and temporary mitigation.

Reporting & Quality

Produce daily/weekly reports on SLA adherence, WIP aging, cost variance, and vendor performance.

Flag repeat issues, recommend root-cause fixes (access hardware, part stocking, vendor changes).

Qualifications:

Fluent in English and Spanish language

Maintenance coordinating experience in a US Property Management company is a must

Knowledgeable in construction engineering is a plus

Has excellent problem solving skill

Good communication skills in English

Outstanding skills in organizing schedules

Experience with property management software Buildium/Property Meld is a plus

Self-driven and can work with little supervision

Extremely organized and can work in a constantly changing and fast past environment

Want to have a stable career with endless potential for learning and growth

Able to work on EST Business hours



IF YOU ARE NOT A BILINGUAL MAINTENANCE COORDINATOR- Please do not Apply or you will not be entertained. Thank you

title: HOA Manager
description:
The HOA Property Manager is responsible for the day?to?day operations, governance support, vendor oversight, and owner/resident experience across an assigned portfolio of homeowner associations. This role requires strong analytical ability, impeccable attention to detail, and exceptional written and verbal communication skills. The manager serves as the primary liaison among the Board of Directors, unit owners, residents, vendors, and internal teams (Maintenance and Finance), ensuring that association operations comply with governing documents, applicable laws, and company standards while meeting service-level and financial targets.



Key Outcomes (What Success Looks Like):



Accurate, timely Board packets and meeting facilitation with clear minutes and action logs

Portfolio-level adherence to budgets, assessments, and reserve funding plans in partnership with Finance HOA

Proactive maintenance planning and on-time completion of preventive and corrective work with Maintenance HOA

High owner/resident satisfaction, timely resolution of requests, and transparent communications

Clean annual audits, renewed insurance policies, and documented compliance with statutes and governing documents

Up-to-date task/project management in Asana and on-time delivery of recurring HOA cycles and filings



Key Responsibilities:

1) Board & Governance Management

Serve as the primary point of contact for Board members; prepare agendas, Board packets, and management reports for regular and special meetings.

Interpret and apply governing documents (CC&Rs, bylaws, rules) and relevant state statutes in daily operations; coordinate with counsel when required.

Facilitate annual meetings, elections, and owner notices in accordance with legal and governing document requirements.

2) Owner & Resident Relations

Maintain responsive, professional communication with trustees/Board, unit owners, and residents via
, phone, and portal.

Issue timely association-wide notices (policy changes, maintenance schedules, community events, compliance reminders).

Manage and resolve escalations, complaints, architectural review requests (ARC), violations, and hearings within established SLAs.

3) Financial Coordination & Reporting 

Support budget development, reserve study implementation, and monthly variance commentary; review financials for accuracy.

Monitor assessment billing, collections, payment plans, and delinquency follow-up in alignment with collection policies.

Review and approve invoices, code expenses to budgets, and validate vendor work completion prior to payment.

4) Maintenance, Projects & Vendor Management (with Maintenance HOA)

Translate Board priorities into annual maintenance calendars; schedule and track preventive maintenance and inspections.

Open, monitor, and close work orders; ensure scope, SLA, and quality standards are met; maintain accurate asset records.

Bid, negotiate, and manage vendor contracts (landscaping, janitorial, security, pools, roofing, elevators, etc.); perform periodic vendor reviews.

Coordinate capital improvement projects (RFPs, proposals, schedules, owner notifications, punch lists, closeout documents).

5) Information Management & Systems

Keep all HOA Asana projects/boards current with daily updates, dependencies, and follow-ups; maintain recurring tasks and automations.

Process resale and lender questionnaire packages accurately and within service timelines; maintain fee schedules.

Maintain organized digital records (governing docs, minutes, contracts, insurance, warranties, architectural files) in the association’s repository.

6) Team Leadership & Development

Train and onboard new APMs/PMs on processes, systems (Asana, accounting/portal), compliance, and customer service standards.

Promote a collaborative, service-oriented culture aligned with company values; escalate staffing/resource needs to the Unit Head.

Key Performance Indicators (KPIs):

On-time completion rate for recurring HOA tasks and compliance filings

Work-order first-response and average time-to-close (by priority)

Delinquency rate and collections effectiveness; percent of assessments collected

Budget adherence (OPEX/CapEx) and variance accuracy; invoice cycle time

Owner/resident satisfaction score; complaint resolution time

Board satisfaction score (post-meeting surveys) and action-item closure rate

Qualifications:

3+ years of HOA/condo association management or related property management experience

Demonstrated proficiency with task/project management tools (Asana) and owner portals; strong Excel/Google Sheets skills

Exceptional communication (written and verbal), meeting facilitation, and stakeholder management

Strong analytical, organizational, and time-management skills; high attention to detail

Working knowledge of governing documents, meeting procedures, collections, elections, and common HOA statutes

title: Urgent Financial Analyst with General Admin Experience
description:
We are urgently seeking a highly analytical and detail-oriented Financial Analyst to support our CEO and Finance/Accounting Team. This role will work closely with our current Financial Analyst and assist in driving financial insights, forecasting, reporting, and strategic analysis across the organization.



This is a work from home position ideal for a finance professional with strong modeling skills and experience supporting senior leadership.



Key Responsibilities

* Evaluate overall financial performance, including key drivers and KPIs

* Build, maintain, and enhance financial and sales models for budgeting, forecasting, and performance measurement

* Assist in establishing and maintaining financial dashboards for senior management and business partners

* Develop weekly, monthly, and quarterly productivity and realization reports across active engagements

* Manage and analyze the firm’s revenue pipeline (prospective, current, and won engagements) across multiple practice lines

* Conduct ad hoc financial analysis and provide actionable recommendations to address emerging business challenges

* Support the development and maintenance of 3-statement financial models for forecasting, M&A activities, and strategic investments



Qualifications & Experience

* Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or related field

* 5+ years of experience in financial analysis, FP&A, corporate finance, or related role

* Strong experience with financial modeling, including 3-statement models

* Experience with budgeting, forecasting, and KPI tracking

* Advanced proficiency in Excel (required); experience with financial planning tools is a plus

* Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills

* Excellent written and verbal communication skills

Preferred Experience

title: Dual Role - Estimator and Draftsman

About the Role

This is a critical role requiring someone who can manage full design documentation and detailed estimating from concept through to tender submission.

title: Marketing Coordinator
description:
A premium boutique interior design studio specialising in beautifully crafted residential spaces. The business work/service blends creativity with functionality, creating refined interiors that reflect the personalities and lifestyles of our clients.



With a strong presence in the Australian design space and features in respected publications, we are known for our thoughtful approach, attention to detail, and elevated brand positioning.



We are currently seeking a highly organised, well-experienced, proactive, and detail-driven Marketing Coordinator to support and execute our digital marketing strategy across multiple platforms.



If you enjoy structured execution, analytics, content organisation, and seeing measurable growth from your work, this role offers the opportunity to make a meaningful and visible impact.



 Role Overview:



You will be responsible for executing an existing 3-month rolling content strategy across digital platforms while continuously refining and enhancing performance through analytics and insights.

Strategic direction, content pillars,
 strategy, and keyword guidance will be provided. Your focus will be on precision execution, optimisation, reporting, and maintaining brand consistency across all channels.

Because this is a design-focused studio working heavily with colour, a device with strong colour accuracy is ideal.



Key Responsibilities:

???? Execute Digital Marketing Strategy

Maintain marketing database and tools

Maintain and update collateral and creative assets

Grow audience and generate referral-based enquiries



???? Press & PR Coordination

Coordinate press commitments and press calendar

Schedule press meetings and interviews based on availability and priorities

Provide press contacts with high-resolution images and prepared press kits

Ensure alignment with the broader marketing strategy before confirming press commitments

Add confirmed meetings and deadlines to the calendar for full visibility

Maintain and update the press contact database to ensure information is current



???? Social Media Management

Execute the approved 3-month content calendar and digital marketing strategy

Coordinate the creation of the next quarterly content calendar (captions, hashtags, post formats) for approval

Coordinate and prepare all social media content and copy for posting across Instagram,
, and LinkedIn, ensuring alignment with premium brand positioning

Schedule and publish feed posts, Stories, Reels, and LinkedIn updates according to the content calendar

Create polished social content from photoshoot images or existing studio assets and repurpose into suitable formats for different platforms (carousel posts, Reels, Stories, LinkedIn carousels)

Manage community engagement by responding to comments and direct messages, tagging partners, collaborators, and press appropriately, and reposting or acknowledging relevant mentions

Ensure campaigns remain visually consistent and aligned across all platforms, reflecting branding and positioning

Track performance metrics, including engagement, reach, follower growth, content performance, website clicks, and conversions

Provide monthly reports to the relevant internal coordinator

Recommend content optimisations and strategic adjustments to grow audience and engagement



???? Content and Studio Collateral (Canva)

Coordinate and update existing marketing collateral (studio profile, press kits, project materials)

Assist with minor edits or formatting of assets for digital/internal use or video repurposing

Ensure collateral remains consistent with current brand direction

Repurpose existing creative assets (videos, photos, graphics) into new formats



????
 Marketing (Klaviyo)

Coordinate and schedule all planned
 campaigns (newsletters, announcements, nurture flows) using existing branded templates

Maintain audience segmentation and keep mailing lists updated

Monitor nurture flows to ensure segmented audiences receive correct
s

Track and report campaign performance, including open rates, click-through rates, conversions, and lead magnet downloads

Identify and troubleshoot bounced
s, delivery issues, or segmentation errors



???? CRM Management

Coordinate outreach and communications with partners, agents, and leads, ensuring timely and professional follow-ups

Track and manage interactions

Maintain 100?curacy in CRM (contacts, tags, lead statuses)

Collaborate to improve workflows and optimise processes

Manage
 templates and nurture sequences within the CRM



???? Website Management (WordPress)

Coordinate website content updates with the creative team

Add new project pages, update press features, and post blogs

Ensure all content is free from errors, formatted correctly, and visually consistent

Check that pages, links, and media function correctly after updates

Coordinate for hard-coded updates or unresolved errors when required



???? Research & SEO

Support basic SEO tasks and research under guidance

Update and monitor Google Business Profile

Request Google reviews when appropriate

Report findings to the relevant internal coordinator



???? Strategy and Reporting

Prepare monthly reporting on key performance indicators (KPIs), including:



 ---- Social media metrics (engagement, reach, growth)

 marketing KPIs (open rates, click-through rates, conversions)

 ---- Present monthly findings via online meeting or PDF report

 ---- Adjust the digital marketing strategy quarterly based on performance analytics and evolving business goals



???? Admin & Operations Support (Secondary Responsibility)

Manage press and events-related
s using Google Workspace

Maintain press and CRM contact databases

Manage calendar bookings for interviews, photoshoots, and PR-related events

Track awards and submissions

Monitor marketing systems and tools for new features and suggest improvements



Type of Person We Are Looking For

Strong digital marketing coordination experience

Highly organised and detail-oriented

Proactive and solutions-focused

Comfortable managing multiple platforms simultaneously

Strong analytical mindset

Creative with a strong sense of aesthetics and colour

Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

Ability to maintain premium brand consistency







Qualifications and Experience / Skills Required

???? Essential:

Previous 2–3 years of experience as a Marketing Coordinator or Digital Marketing VA, ideally in lifestyle, design, or creative sectors.

Experience managing social media accounts professionally

Experience with
 marketing platforms

Experience with the Copper and Klaviyo CRM systems

WordPress experience

Strong Canva skills

Excellent English communication skills

High level of organisation and accuracy

???? Desirable:

Experience working with premium or creative brands

Basic SEO knowledge

Experience in analytics reporting

Familiarity with WordPress is preferred. We already have existing training materials prepared for the new marketing tea
mber.







Tools and Software

Canva

 marketing platform (e.g., Klaviyo)

Copper and Klaviyo CRM

WordPress

Google Workspace

Social media scheduling tools

Analytics platforms

Workdays: 6 days per week

Daily Hours: 8 hours per day



Note: This position is open to applicants fro
tro Manila and nearby cities only.





Role Overview

We are looking for a dedicated Social Media Account Manager to join our growing agency. This role involves creating, growing, and managing multiple social media accounts across platforms including Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts,
/Threads, and more. The ideal candidate will have strong technical skills, excellent English proficiency, and the ability to maintain consistent posting schedules across multiple accounts.



Key Responsibilities

- Create and manage social media accounts across multiple platforms (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts,
/Threads, etc.)

- Develop and implement content posting strategies for each platform

- Maintain daily posting schedules across all managed accounts

- Understand and navigate platform-specific algorithms to maximize growth

- Monitor account performance and adjust strategies accordingly

- Maintain organized records of account credentials and performance metrics

- Ensure accounts appear authentic and follow natural growth patterns

- Implement best practices for account security and growth

- Capcut Editing Required





Technical Requirements

- Must have a personal computer, not shared with family or partners, dedicated to EMF work during shifts

- Computer must reliably support work tracking software (Gastime / DeskTime equivalent)

- Strong understanding of proxy usage for account management

- Reliable high-speed internet connection

- Back-up Internet for power outage or internet issues

- Basic troubleshooting abilities

- Experience with social media management tools

- Comfortable using CapCut for video editing (basic navigation and operations required)



Required Skills

- Excellent English proficiency (high B or C level)

- Proven experience managing multiple social media accounts

- Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

- Ability to work independently and maintain consistent productivity

- Technical aptitude with computers and mobile devices

- Reliability and punctuality in meeting posting schedules

- Experience with Apple products (MacBooks and iPhones)



Preferred Skills

- Previous experience in social media growth strategies

- Understanding of content curation and platform-specific best practices

- Familiarity with social media analytics

- Ability to adapt to changing platform guidelines and algorithms

- Experience managing multiple accounts simultaneously



Professional Development

- Comprehensive training in social media growth strategies, trends, and platform algorithms

- Hands-on experience with proven growth methods across multiple platforms

- Regular upskilling in emerging social media tools and practices

- Career Advancement Opportunities

title: YouTube Thumbnail Designer
description:
I am looking for a long-term thumbnail designer for a growing  YouTube channel. We publish 5 videos per week and need someone who can keep up consistently.



I am looking for someone who:

Has real YouTube thumbnail experience — not just general graphic design

Can create dramatic, illustrated-style thumbnails — either using AI image generation tools (Midjourney, Ideogram, etc.) or by sourcing and compositing strong illustrated imagery

Comfortable working WITHOUT real photographs — our thumbnails use illustrated, AI-generated, or icon-based designs, not photo-based layouts

Understands what makes people click

Can follow a detailed brief (I provide the title, style guide, and competitor examples for every video)

Has a fast turnaround — 24 hours per thumbnail

Wants to grow with the channel long-term



How it works:

I provide a brief for each video via Trello (title, background color direction, text hierarchy, competitor reference)

You deliver 2 versions per thumbnail (PNG, 1280x720)

I review and approve — usually takes me under a minute



If you have read the middle of this job post, please type your favorite animal at the beginning of your proposal.



I will do a paid trial run first before committing long-term.



Pay: $5 per thumbnail (2 versions), ~5 thumbnails per week

Communication: Trello + WhatsApp



Please include a Google Drive folder with multiple examples of YouTube thumbnails you have created. Templates or mockups will not be considered — actual client work only.



I will share reference examples of the thumbnail style I am targeting during the interview.

title: WordPress Web Designer (Elementor) — Long Term Role with Australian MSP
description:
Hi, my name is Brett and I'm the Director of 4iT, an IT Managed Service Provider based in Sydney, Australia.



I'm looking for a dedicated WordPress web designer who is experienced with Elementor to join our team on a full time, long term basis.



You'll be designing and building WordPress websites using Elementor for both our business and our clients. This includes creating new sites from scratch, updating and improving existing sites, and adding content such as pages, blog posts, images, and calls to action. WordPress is our primary platform, but some of our clients have websites on other platforms such as Wix, so you may occasionally need to update content on those sites as well.



Here is what the role involves day to day:



+ Designing and building WordPress websites using Elementor.

+ Adding and updating content on existing WordPress sites.

+ Occasionally updating content on client websites built on other platforms such as Wix.

+ Creating landing pages and new website sections.

+ Basic on page SEO (meta titles, descriptions, alt tags, internal linking).

+ Working with me to ensure sites are professional, modern, and aligned with our clients' brands.

+ Light image editing and sourcing for web use.



You will have access to paid AI tools and are encouraged to use them to work smarter and more efficiently. We invest in the best tools to help our team do great work.



What I'm looking for:



+ Experience building WordPress websites using Elementor (this is the most important skill).

+ A portfolio or examples of WordPress sites you have designed.

+ Good attention to detail and an eye for clean, professional design.

+ Willingness to learn our way of doing things and follow instructions.

+ Reliable daily communication.



This is a full time position (40 hours per week). You should work during regular Philippine daytime hours (for example 8am to 5pm or 9am to 6pm PHT). This naturally overlaps with our Australian business hours which is important for daily communication. This role is intended to be your primary job and I expect your full time commitment during these hours.



I do expect a daily report at the end of your working day so we stay aligned.



I'm looking for someone who wants to grow with us over the long term. I believe in investing in the people I work with and I will provide training, feedback, and support to help you succeed.



Salary is $700 to $900 USD per month depending on your experience. I will also pay the 13th month bonus in December.



If this sounds like a good fit for you, I'd love to hear from you. Please include the word 4iTWEB at the end of your application so I know you have read this post carefully.



I look forward to hearing from you.



Brett

Director, 4iT

Sydney, Australia

title: Quality Control Photo Editor (Remote) — Real Estate Photo Editing
description:
*100% REMOTE OPPORTUNITY! NEVER WALK TO WORK AGAIN!*

Work from the comfort of your own home!

Apply and come see why every employee we’ve hired never wants to leave us



If you want a steady role where your attention to detail actually matters, Dream Home Shots is hiring a Quality Control Photo Editor to be the final set of eyes on our AI-edited photos before they go to clients.



Schedule (must match exactly)

-------------------------------------------

Monday – Saturday, 7:30 PM–11:30 PM EST

(Tuesday – Sunday, 8:30 AM–12:30 PM PHT)

* - Must be available for this exact schedule.

Hours may likely move to a full-time position.



About the Role:

----------------------

We’re a busy real estate media company switching to AI editing. We’re looking for someone with a reliable, time-efficient work ethic who is very detail-oriented and has strong English reading/writing skills.

Your job will be to quality control all photo edits we run through our AI editing software and make corrections when needed.



In this role you will:

- Review all photos to catch common mistakes by the editing software

- Complete photographer notes (item removals, minor fixes)

- Correct color/lens issues in Photoshop/Lightroom

- Upload the final images to our photo delivery platform



Required skills:

---------------------

- Strong Photoshop + Lightroom skills

- Ability to perform Color correction & identify wall color accuracy

- Lens corrections/distortion awareness

- Basic item removal

- Detail-oriented

- Able to be efficient without lowering quality expectations

- Strong English Abilities (Active communication, strong listening skills, and good English comprehension)

- HDR hand blending

- Virtual twilights/staging knowledge

- Experience with real estate photo editing



Daily workflow:

----------------------

- 7:30 PM: Pull completed AI photo edits

- Quality control against photographer notes and raw exposures

- Fix color/lighting consistency, lens corrections, AI artifacts

- Basic item removal in Photoshop

- Upload to the delivery platform

- End-of-shift handoff message for the AM team if anything is pending



How to Apply:

---------------------

If you are detail-oriented, professional, and excited to support a growing company, we’d love to hear from you! ????



Please provide EVERYTHING we ask for to be considered.

Send an
 to 
 with the subject:

“Application - Quality Control Photo Editor”



Include:

------------

- Your portfolio (before and after examples preferred)

- Your updated resume

- A short voice or video recording (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining your editing experience

- Internet speed and computer specs

- A picture of a pink duck





Important:

----------------
