title: Go High Level Specialist
description:
We’re Hiring: Go High Level Specialist (2-Week Contract) Backend Systems Optimisation – Fixed Term

Hey, I’m Lillie 

I run Integrated Health, a Pilates and movement business based in Newman, WA, supporting both in-person and online clients.

We’ve already migrated some platforms into Go High Level (GHL).

Now I need a true GHL specialist to come in, clean it up, optimise it properly, and build it the right way.

This is NOT an ongoing VA role.

This is a 2-week intensive systems contract.



Contract Details

Duration: 2 weeks only

Pay: AUD $10/hour

Fixed timeframe - all work must be completed within 14 days

No extension beyond two weeks

You will work directly with me and my current VA

Clear scope, clear outcomes, clean handover

If you cannot complete structured system work within 2 weeks, this role isn’t for you.





What You’ll Be Responsible For

1 Full GHL System Optimisation

Map and refine full client journey

(Lead ? Booking ? Intake ? Session ? Follow-up ? Rebooking)

Create and clean pipelines

Clean custom fields

Clean tags and segmentation

Remove duplicate workflows

Reduce manual admin works

Create a Full CRM.

No messy backend. No spaghetti automations.



2Booking & Payment Structure

Optimise booking calendars

Ensure correct triggers after bookings

Proper Stripe integration inside GHL

Ensure payment flows are smooth and automated

Reduce double notifications or missed reminders

You must understand:

Stripe + GHL linking

Booking triggers

Workflow automations



3 Clinical Notes Structure

Improve internal note storage

Reduce form downloads and re-uploads

Create structured reusable note templates

Automate post-session internal actions

This is a movement + clinical business — structure matters.



4 Dashboard & Reporting

Create simple dashboards for:

Bookings

Retention

Revenue

Standardise naming conventions

Clean backend architecture for handover



5 SOP Creation

You will:

Help create clear SOPs for:

Workflows

Booking systems

Stripe integration

Automation edits

Document what you build

Ensure my VA can manage the system after handover

You will work collaboratively with both myself and my VA during build decisions.



Required Skills

You MUST have:

Strong, proven Go High Level build experience

Stripe + GHL integration experience

Booking calendar configuration experience

Workflow automation build experience

CRM structure experience

Squarespace familiarity

Google Workspace workflow experience

Experience documenting SOPs clearly

If you have only “basic GHL exposure” - this is not the role.



What This Is Not

Not social media management

Not content writing

Not ongoing admin

Not design-heavy work

This is backend system architecture and optimisation.



What You Must Send With Your Application

Subject line: “GHL Specialist – 2 Week Contract”

Send to: 

Include:

1 Example of GHL system flow you’ve built

(Screenshot or Loom walkthrough)

2 Example of booking calendar setup inside GHL

3 Explanation or Loom of how you link Stripe to GHL correctly

4 Example of workflow automation you’ve built

5 Confirmation you can complete full scope within 14 days

6 Brief explanation of how you document SOPs for handover

Bonus:

Experience working with wellness, health or Pilates businesses.



What Success Looks Like After 2 Weeks

Clean backend

Streamlined workflows

Automated reminders + follow-ups

Structured clinical notes

Stripe working smoothly

Clear dashboards

Documented SOPs

My VA confident managing the system



If you love refining messy systems and building clean backend architecture…

This will suit you.

If you prefer ongoing casual admin work…It won’t.

title: Social Media Account Manager
description:
Application Link: 



Compensation & Benefits

Salary: USD $500–$700 per month (depending on experience)

Employment Type: Full-time

Paid Time Off (PTO): 2 days PTO per month after successful completion of the 30?day trial period

Monthly KPI Bonuses: Performance-based incentives tied to account growth and productivity metrics

Career Growth: Long-term role with advancement opportunities



Working Schedule

Instagram SMM Shift: 7:00 AM – 3:00 PM (Manila time)

Workdays: 6 days per week

Daily Hours: 8 hours per day



Note: This position is open to applicants fro
tro Manila and nearby cities only.





Role Overview

We are looking for a dedicated Social Media Account Manager to join our growing agency. This role involves creating, growing, and managing multiple social media accounts across platforms including Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts,
/Threads, and more. The ideal candidate will have strong technical skills, excellent English proficiency, and the ability to maintain consistent posting schedules across multiple accounts.



Key Responsibilities

- Create and manage social media accounts across multiple platforms (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts,
/Threads, etc.)

- Develop and implement content posting strategies for each platform

- Maintain daily posting schedules across all managed accounts

- Understand and navigate platform-specific algorithms to maximize growth

- Monitor account performance and adjust strategies accordingly

- Maintain organized records of account credentials and performance metrics

- Ensure accounts appear authentic and follow natural growth patterns

- Implement best practices for account security and growth

- Capcut Editing Required





Technical Requirements

- Must have a personal computer, not shared with family or partners, dedicated to EMF work during shifts

- Computer must reliably support work tracking software (Gastime / DeskTime equivalent)

- Strong understanding of proxy usage for account management

- Reliable high-speed internet connection

- Back-up Internet for power outage or internet issues

- Basic troubleshooting abilities

- Experience with social media management tools

- Comfortable using CapCut for video editing (basic navigation and operations required)



Required Skills

- Excellent English proficiency (high B or C level)

- Proven experience managing multiple social media accounts

- Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

- Ability to work independently and maintain consistent productivity

- Technical aptitude with computers and mobile devices

- Reliability and punctuality in meeting posting schedules

- Experience with Apple products (MacBooks and iPhones)



Preferred Skills

- Previous experience in social media growth strategies

- Understanding of content curation and platform-specific best practices

- Familiarity with social media analytics

- Ability to adapt to changing platform guidelines and algorithms

- Experience managing multiple accounts simultaneously



Professional Development

- Comprehensive training in social media growth strategies, trends, and platform algorithms

- Hands-on experience with proven growth methods across multiple platforms

- Regular upskilling in emerging social media tools and practices

- Career Advancement Opportunities

title: Chief Operating Officer (COO)
description:
Compensation

USD $5,000 – $6,000 per month, depending on experience

Work Setup: Remote

Reports To: CEO



How to Apply:

To apply, please complete this form:


/
/f/2kz0ma3h-1156/MHHLY4BOXCKVXG8CCW



We are seeking an experienced Chief Operating Officer (COO) to lead overall business operations, revenue performance, and organizational execution across client accounts and internal teams.



This role is responsible for driving operational strategy, scaling systems, improving profitability, and ensuring strong leadership across department heads. The COO will work closely with the CEO and leadership team to optimize performance, team structure, and operational efficiency.



Teams Overseen: Operations, Sales, Messaging, Support, and Department Managers



Key Responsibilities

Operations & Strategy

- Lead day-to-day company operations and ensure execution aligns with business goals

- Build scalable systems, workflows, and SOPs to improve efficiency and profitability

- Monitor key business metrics including revenue growth, operational efficiency, retention, and cost control

- Identify operational risks and implement solutions proactively

- Drive monthly and quarterly initiatives with clear KPIs and accountability



Leadership & Team Management

- Lead and mentor department heads, supervisors, and operational leaders

- Build strong accountability structures and performance management systems

- Oversee hiring strategy, leadership development, and organizational structure

- Improve cross-team collaboration and communication

- Maintain high team morale while enforcing performance standards



Performance, Quality & Reporting

- Establish dashboards and reporting systems for leadership visibility

- Ensure operational quality, compliance, and account security standards

- Oversee revenue optimization strategies and performance improvements

- Present weekly and monthly performance insights with actionable recommendations

- Support decision-making through data-driven analysis



Qualifications

Required Experience

- Minimum 4+ years of leadership experience in operations, business management, or scaling teams

- Proven experience managing managers or department leaders

- Background in digital businesses, online sales, creator platforms, or subscription-based environments is a strong advantage



Skills & Traits

- Strong strategic thinking with hands-on execution ability

- Excellent leadership, coaching, and decision-making skills

- Data-driven with strong business and revenue awareness

- Highly organized with the ability to manage multiple departments

- Clear communicator with strong accountability and ownership mindset

- Strong focus on compliance, risk management, and operational stability

title: Part-time or Full-time Home-based ESL Tutor
description:
Longone, a leading provider of ESL education in China since 2017, is seeking dedicated and innovative educators to join our expanding team of home-based teachers. Due to strong and consistent student demand, our current teaching schedule is fully booked, and we are actively recruiting additional qualified teachers to meet this growing need.



1. About the Role

As an online tutor, you will conduct one-on-one English lessons with both children and adults in China. Depending on the number of classes booked, you can earn between 10,000 and 50,000 pesos per month. Outstanding performance may lead to further opportunities within the company.



2. Key Responsibilities

Deliver engaging and interactive English lessons.

Tailor lesson plans creatively to suit students’ needs.

Use effective teaching aids and techniques.

Foster a positive learning environment for both children and adults.



3. Compensation and Schedule

Competitive rates: 70–90 pesos per 25-minute class.

Flexible schedules available for both part-time and full-time positions.



4. Requirements

Bachelor’s degree (Education, Communication, or related fields preferred).

Excellent English communication skills.

Energetic and creative teaching style, with effective use of gestures.

NBI clearance.



5. Technical Requirements

Desktop or laptop computer.

Headset with microphone and noise-canceling feature.

Wired internet connection (minimum 5 Mbps).

Quiet, well-lit teaching environment.



6. Application Process

If you are interested in joining our team, please submit your application via Microsoft Teams (formerly known as
) by contacting us at Microsoft Teams (formerly known as
)  ID: d690e5e26dd8c968



We look forward to welcoming passionate educators to our team!

title: Creative Graphics & Promo Designer – Podcast (Home Service Industry)
description:
We host a growing podcast focused on home service business owners (HVAC, plumbing, electrical). Each week we release a new episode and multiple short clips across LinkedIn, YouTube, Instagram,
, and TikTok.



We’re looking for a creative graphics professional who can make our content look sharp, clean, and scroll-stopping.



This is not basic template work. We want someone who understands brand consistency, typography, hierarchy, and platform-native design.



What You’ll Create

 • Episode announcement graphics

 • Guest quote cards

 • Carousel posts for LinkedIn

 • Occasional promo graphics for webinars or live events

 • Branded overlays for video clips



What We’re Looking For

 • Strong portfolio of podcast, YouTube, or social media promo work

 • Clean, modern design style

 • Ability to create bold thumbnails that drive clicks

 • Fast turnaround time, weekly deadlines

 • Comfortable designing for multiple platforms

 • Fluent English communication

 • Ability to follow brand guidelines while improving them



Bonus if you:

 • Understand the home services or trades industry

 • Have worked with podcast hosts or personal brands

 • Know how to design with conversion in mind



Scope

 • Ongoing weekly work

 • Approx. 5–10 graphics per episode

 • Flexible hours, remote



To Apply:

 1. Share your portfolio link

 2. Send 2–3 examples of thumbnails or promos you’ve created

 3. Tell us briefly how you would improve a podcast’s visual presence



We care about clean execution, strong design instincts, and consistency.



If you’re proud of your work and want to help elevate a growing brand, we’d love to see what you can do.

title: Part-Time Programming Tutor (JavaScript, React, Django) – 5–10 hrs/week
description:
I am currently enrolled in an online Computer Science program and am looking for a part-time virtual programming tutor to supplement my coursework.



This role is focused on structured learning and hands-on guidance while working through real projects. I am not looking for someone to complete assignments for me. My goal is to strengthen my understanding of core programming concepts while applying them directly to coursework.



Technologies & Topics:

    •    JavaScript (ES6+)

    •    React (Vite setup)

    •    JSX

    •    HTML5 / CSS3

    •    Bootstrap

    •    Python

    •    Django (models, views, routing, templates, authentication)

    •    Git & GitHub workflow

    •    JSON / AJAX

    •    Core concepts: objects, arrays, functions, classes, destructuring, state & props



What I’m Looking For:

    •    Strong fundamentals in JavaScript and Python

    •    Ability to clearly explain concepts step-by-step

    •    Comfortable reviewing code live and debugging together

    •    Experience with React and Django preferred

    •    Good English communication skills

    •    Reliable internet connection and availability for video sessions



Hours:

    •    5–10 hours per week

    •    Flexible scheduling (US time zones preferred overlap)



Important:



This is a tutoring role. You will guide, teach, and explain concepts while we work through problems together. I want to improve problem-solving skills and deepen conceptual understanding.



If interested, please include:

    1.    Your experience with React and Django

    2.    A brief explanation of how you structure tutoring sessions

    3.    Your hourly rate

    4.    Your availability (including time zone)



Looking forward to connecting.

title: Meta and Google Ad Creatives Designer
description:
We are looking for a skilled and experienced Ads Creative Specialist to handle daily ad creative production for our dropshipping stores.



You must already have experience creating high-converting ad creatives for e-commerce or dropshipping brands across:



• Meta Ads 
 & Instagram)

• Google Ads



We are looking for someone who understands how creatives directly impact:



• CTR

• Conversion Rate

• CPA

• ROAS



This is a long-term collaboration.



The role starts part-time (approximately 2–4 hours per day). The focus is consistent daily creative production and performance-driven improvement.



Your Main Responsibilities:



• Create daily static and video ad creatives

• Develop new hooks and angles for both new and existing products

• Produce multiple variations for testing

• Use AI tools for advanced creative production (AI-generated visuals, AI video, voiceovers, etc.)

• Adapt creatives based on performance data

• Understand funnel-based creatives (TOF / MOF / BOF)

• Align creatives with both Meta and Google ad structures



APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS (READ CAREFULLY)



Applications missing any item below will be ignored.



Please include:



• Your experience creating Meta and Google ad creatives for e-commerce or dropshipping brands

• CV

• Portfolio with examples of ads you personally created (static and video if available)

• Your experience using AI tools (list which ones and how you use them)

• A Loom video (5–10 minutes) explaining:



– Your performance creative experience

– How you think about improving ROAS through creatives

– Your experience using AI tools for creative production

– Why you are interested in this role



Applications that do not follow instructions will not be reviewed.



Compensation range: $3.50–$8/hour (based on experience and performance).



Compensation will be finalized based on proven experience, interview performance, and skill level.



In addition to base hourly compensation, performance-based bonuses may apply depending on results and contribution.

title: Executive Assistant (Ops + Marketing) for Tech?Driven Surveying Firm – Full?Time, Long?Term
description:
Rampa is a small, tech?driven land surveying company based in New York, USA. We work on residential and commercial projects and use modern tools and software to run a lean operation. Our goal is to use technology and smart processes to do more with less, so our field crews and engineers can focus on technical work while our systems and Executive Assistant keep everything organized.



We are looking for a full?time, long?term Executive Assistant who is proactive, highly organized, and very comfortable with technology. You will be the right hand to the owner, helping with operations, marketing/lead generation, and proposal preparation.



***Role Overview

You will:

-Support the owner with daily operations and coordination

-Manage calendars, tasks, and projects in our tools

-Coordinate with field crews and clients

-Help run basic marketing and lead generation using our CRM

-Assist in preparing proposals and documents

-Use and suggest technology and AI tools to automate and simplify repetitive work



This is a 100?% remote, long?term position. You must be comfortable working US Eastern Time hours.



***Key Responsibilities

Operations & Administration:

-Manage the owner’s calendar: meetings, client calls, internal check?ins

-Coordinate field crew schedules (job addresses, start times, changes, and daily updates)

-Monitor and organize
 inboxes; draft and send professional replies and follow?ups

-Keep Google Drive folders and files organized (job folders, contracts, survey files, etc.)

-Take meeting notes, track action items, and follow up to ensure completion



***Project & Task Management

-Create and update tasks and simple project boards in Asana for jobs, follow?ups, and internal tasks

-Help the owner prioritize tasks and keep important deadlines visible

-Track job status from lead ? proposal ? active project ? completed



***Marketing, Lead Generation & CRM

-Keep our CRM (HubSpot) clean, updated, and organized (contacts, companies, deals, notes) using HubSpot

-Enter and maintain leads from website,
, calls, and referrals

-Send follow?up
s to warm and existing leads based on templates and owner guidance

-Run simple
 sequences or campaigns inside HubSpot (we will provide direction and templates)

-Assist with basic marketing tasks, such as:

    Light research on potential clients or local partners

    Drafting simple outreach messages or
s

    Helping prepare occasional short posts or content ideas (no heavy design work required)



***Proposals & Documents

-Prepare and format proposals, quotes, and simple contracts in Google Docs/Word following our templates

-Ensure proposals are sent out on time, and follow?up is scheduled and executed

-Help maintain a library of updated proposal templates, price lists, and standard text



***Technology & AI

-Use Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, Docs, Sheets, Drive) daily

-Comfortably adopt and use AI tools (for example: drafting first?pass
s, summarizing notes, basic research, creating draft proposal text) to save time and reduce manual work

-Proactively suggest ways to automate or streamline routine tasks (templates, checklists, simple automations, etc.)



***Requirements

-5+ years of experience as an Executive Assistant, Administrative Assistant, Office Manager, or similar role, ideally with some remote work experience

-Excellent English (written and spoken) – you will communicate directly with US clients and partners

--Strong skills with:

  
 and calendar management (Gmail / Outlook)

   Google Workspace – Docs, Sheets, Drive

   Task or project tools (preferably Asana, or similar tools like ClickUp/Trello)

   CRM tools (ideally HubSpot, but we can train the right person)

-Comfortable learning and using AI tools to speed up writing, research, and basic admin work

-Very organized, detail?oriented, and proactive – you don’t wait to be told every small step

-Able to work with minimal supervision, manage your own time, and communicate clearly

-Reliable computer, stable high?speed internet, and a quiet, professional place for calls/meetings

-Willing and able to work full?time, 40 hours/week, aligned with US Eastern Time (for example, 9?AM–5?PM New York time, Monday–Friday)



***Nice?to?Have (Bonus)

-Experience in construction, engineering, surveying, or other field?service businesses

-Experience with HubSpot, specifically for CRM and basic marketing

-Basic understanding of proposals, quotes, and service contracts

-Experience creating or improving SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures) and checklists



***Work Schedule

-Full?time: 40 hours per week

-Core hours: must be available during 9?AM–5?PM Eastern Time (New York), Monday–Friday

-Some flexibility may be needed for urgent client or scheduling issues



***Compensation

-This is a long?term position with stable monthly pay in USD

-Please state your desired monthly salary in USD in your application

-Salary will depend on your experience, skills, and fit with the role

-Payment monthly via online methods (e.g. Wise, PayPal, bank transfer)



***How to Apply (Read Carefully)

To help us see your attention to detail, please follow these steps exactly:

?

1) Use the
 or OnlineJobs.ph message subject line:

“GREEN TECH EA – Application for Rampa”



2) In your message, answer these questions briefly:

A. In 4–6 sentences, explain why you are a good fit to be an Executive Assistant for a tech?driven surveying firm.

B. Describe a time you managed conflicting priorities or urgent tasks for your boss or team. What did you do and what was the result?

C. List the main tools you have used for:



   Calendar and

   Project/task management

   CRM/marketing

   Any AI tools you have actually used (ChatGPT, others)



D. Confirm the hours you can work in Philippine time that match 9?AM–5?PM Eastern Time.



3) Attach your most recent CV/Resume (PDF).



4) Optional but strongly preferred: include a 1–2 minute voice or video recording introducing yourself and briefly describing your most relevant experience.



Only applicants who follow all of the instructions above (including the correct subject line) will be considered.

title: Creative Designer
description:
Fusion Vine is a remote-first company focused on building scalable systems by combining skilled talent with AI-powered workflows. We support businesses through content, creative, and digital execution while prioritizing efficiency, clarity, and quality.



Our team is distributed globally and operates with clear SOPs, structured feedback, and performance-based growth. We value execution, accountability, and continuous improvement.



Role Overview

We are hiring a Creative Specialist to support our visual content needs and reduce reliance on subcontractors. This role focuses on producing high-quality, on-brand visual assets using a mix of design tools and AI-assisted platforms.

This is a priority role aimed at bringing creative work in-house while maintaining speed, consistency, and quality.



Key Goal

Reduce dependency on external subcontractors by producing consistent, high-quality visual assets internally.



Responsibilities

Create visual content using Canva Pro, Photoshop, and AI tools

Produce graphics for digital use (social media, marketing, content assets, etc.)

Use AI tools (e.g., InVideo or similar) to assist with creative production

Follow brand guidelines, templates, and creative briefs

Edit, resize, and optimize images for different platforms

Manage workload efficiently and meet deadlines

Apply feedback quickly and accurately



Skills & Requirements

Proven experience with Canva Pro (required)

Working knowledge of Photoshop

Experience or familiarity with AI creative tools (e.g., InVideo, nano banana, midjourney, kling.ai)

Strong attention to detail and visual consistency

Ability to follow creative instructions and SOPs

Reliable internet connection and suitable device for design work



Workload Expectations

Approx.
images per month for full time work

Volume may vary depending on project needs and performance



If you’ve read this far, please include “TACOS” in the subject line when applying for this role.



Compensation

Hourly, based on experience and skill level

Final rate discussed during the hiring process

Remote



About the app:

AirLister is an Australian property listing app built with React Native (Expo / Rork) and Supabase. The UI is finished and core features are built: property uploads working, basic messaging built, Google login working, Apple login (not connected). We now need backend fixes and App Store submission support.



I will give you access via Github and Supabase 

 - there is no stripe or payment integration in the app 

ideally looking for a long term partner to complete future work



Scope of work:



Full review functionality of the app - the UI is completed and functionally working - the main function of the app is to be able to upload your property and pictures and allow users to message you directly



Review and fix Supabase setup – check database structure and RLS policies, fix authentication and session issues, ensure production environment is correct.



Fix Apple Sign-In – correct Supabase + Apple Developer configuration and ensure it works in production build.



Review messaging – ensure real-time messaging works reliably and fix user permissions/subscriptions.



Set up push notifications – configure Expo push notifications and ensure iOS notifications work for new messages.



Set up
 notifications – integrate transactional
 (Resend, SendGrid or similar) and send
 when a new message or enquiry is received.



Prepare and submit the app to the Apple App Store.



Requirements:

Strong React Native + Expo experience, Supabase Auth experience, Apple Sign-In setup experience, push notification setup experience, and experience submitting apps to the App Store.



To apply, please include:

Links to 2 apps you have personally published, confirmation you’ve worked with Supabase, confirmation you’ve set up Apple login before, your fixed price, and your estimated timeline.



This is not a rebuild. The app is already built. We need backend stabilisation and App Store approval.

title: Creative Project Coordinator (Creative/Marketing)
description:
Company: Simply Nootropics

Location: Remote

Position Type: Full-Time



About Us



Simply Nootropics is a fast-growing, performance-driven supplement e-commerce company based in New Zealand. We develop scientifically formulated supplements and nootropics designed to support longevity, anti-ageing, brain health, stress resilience, and cognitive performance. Our customers span New Zealand, Australia, Singapore, and increasingly Europe and the USA. We are focused on building a premium global brand grounded in science, operational excellence, and high-impact creative execution. Our team is ambitious, accountable, and collaborative. We value strong systems, clear communication, and delivering work we’re genuinely proud of.



The Role



The Creative Project Coordinator is the operational backbone of the Creative Team. This role ensures projects move efficiently from brief to delivery, deadlines are met, feedback loops don’t stall production, and assets are delivered to a consistently high standard. 



You will act as the quality gate between the Creative Team and the Head of Creative, maintaining structure, clarity, and accountability across all marketing channels. This role is ideal for someone highly systems-oriented, detail-focused, and confident managing multiple parallel workflows in a fast-paced eCommerce environment.



Project & Workflow Coordination (35%)

- Coordinate briefs, timelines, and deliverables across the Creative Team

- Own and maintain the marketing calendar, ensuring deadlines are clearly communicated and consistently met across all channels and campaigns

- Surface blockers early and keep work moving without needing to be chased

- Help manage feedback loops across all marketing channels — web,
, paid social, organic social, and community — to ensure input and approvals don't stall production

- Keep project management tooling accurate, up to date, and consistently used across the team



Quality Assurance & Review (20%)

- Review all creative assets and deliverables before they reach the Head of Creative or external stakeholders

- Maintain QA/QC checklists across channels and formats, flagging errors, inconsistencies, and off-brand work

- Act as the quality gate between the Creative Team and the Head of Creative



Asset Management (15%)

- Own the creative asset library with naming conventions, version control, folder structure, and archiving

- Ensure assets are organised, accessible, and up to date across all markets and channels

- Manage incoming and outgoing files between internal teams and external partners



Creative Briefing Support (5%)

- Review briefs for completeness and flag gaps before they reach the creative team

- Maintain a brief library and ensure consistency in how briefs are structured across channels



Reporting & Documentation (5%)

- Compile and maintain recurring creative reports and performance summaries across channels

- Track creative output volumes, status dashboards, and on-time delivery rates

- Keep internal documentation current — briefs, process docs, templates, and team references



Meeting Coordination & Team Communication (5%)

- Schedule and manage recurring pod meetings, tea
etings, and cross-functional check-ins

- Coordinate across time zones to ensure the full team is aligned and no one is consistently left out of key conversations

- Maintain meeting cadences, send agendas where needed, and ensure notes and action items are documented and accessible



Budget & Production Spend Tracking (5%)

- Track creative production costs, POs, and invoices against budget

- Flag overruns or anomalies to the Head of Creative

- Maintain a running view of spend across vendors, tools, and production

- Operational Systems & Process Compliance (5%)

- Monitor how the team's tools are being used day-to-day, identifying gaps where processes aren't being followed or tools aren't being used to their full potential

- Serve as the go-to resource for tool-related questions, helping the team work within established systems correctly and consistently

- Flag recurring workarounds or process breakdowns to the Head of Creative and recommend solutions



Requirements/Experience:

- 3+ years in a project coordination, creative operations, or marketing operations role

- Experience supporting a Creative or Marketing team

- Experience in eCommerce or DTC environments preferred



Systems & Tools:

- Strong experience using ClickUp (or similar PM tool) to manage workflows and reporting

- Confident reviewing and managing feedback in Figma & 

- Experience maintaining structured asset systems in Google Drive

- Proficient in Google Sheets for tracking and dashboards

- Comfortable working in Slack and remote, cross-timezone teams



Preferred:

- Familiarity with
 platforms (e.g., Klaviyo)

- Familiarity with CMS tools (e.g., Shopify, Webflow, WordPress)

- Exposure to paid media environments (Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads)

- Experience maintaining documentation in Notion or similar tools



What We’re Looking For:

- Highly systems-oriented and detail-driven

- Proactive in identifying blockers and solving problems early

- Comfortable managing multiple campaigns simultaneously

- Strong communicator who can coordinate across teams confidently

- Takes ownership and thrives in a fast-moving environment



How to Apply



Please send:



1. Your resume

2. A short cover note highlighting your experience with project management tools (e.g., ClickUp), Figma collaboration, asset 3. management systems, and workflow coordination

4. (Optional) Examples of dashboards, project boards, QA checklists, process documentation, asset libraries, or reporting trackers you’ve created

5. Shortlisted candidates will be asked to complete a brief skills assessment relevant to creative workflow coordination.



Why Join Us?



- Work remotely with a globally distributed team

- Opportunity for long-term growth in a fast-scaling eCommerce brand

- Be part of an ambitious, performance-driven marketing team

- Play a key role in strengthening creative operations and delivery across multiple international markets



Join Simply Nootropics and help build the operational engine behind a growing global wellness brand.

title: Credit Analyst (Commercial Finance)
description:
Position Title: Offshore Credit Analyst (Commercial Finance)



Company: Modavva Capital

Location: Remote / Offshore

Employment Type: Full-Time



About Modavva Capital



Modavva Capital is a capital advisory and structured finance firm specializing in helping small and mid-sized businesses restructure high-cost debt and access institutional capital solutions. Our team works with banks, private credit funds, and specialty lenders to structure refinancing solutions for businesses experiencing cash flow pressure.



We are seeking a detail-oriented Credit Analyst to support our underwriting and deal structuring team.



Position Overview



The Credit Analyst will be responsible for analyzing financial information, calculating debt service coverage ratios (DSCR), evaluating business performance, and preparing underwriting summaries for potential lenders.



This role plays a key part in determining whether a business qualifies for refinancing or restructuring solutions.



Key Responsibilities



Financial Analysis



Review business tax returns, profit and loss statements, and balance sheets



Calculate Debt Service Coverage Ratio (DSCR)



Analyze revenue trends and profitability



Identify owner addbacks such as salary and depreciation



Debt & Cash Flow Analysis



Prepare debt schedules for existing obligations



Evaluate merchant cash advance (MCA) debt stacks



Calculate current and projected debt service payments



Identify opportunities for refinancing or restructuring



Collateral Evaluation



Review collateral including equipment, receivables, and real estate



Estimate lendable value based on advance rates



Underwriting Support



Prepare credit summaries and deal memos



Build financial models for potential loan structures



Assist with lender packaging and submission preparation



Data Management



Maintain deal records within the company CRM



Organize financial documents for underwriting review



Qualifications



Required



Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or a related field



Experience analyzing financial statements



Strong understanding of business cash flow and profitability



Advanced Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets skills



Preferred



Experience in commercial lending, SBA underwriting, or financial analysis



Familiarity with DSCR calculations and loan underwriting



Experience analyzing merchant cash advance debt structures



Skills



Strong analytical and problem-solving skills



High attention to detail



Ability to interpret financial statements



Strong organizational skills



Ability to work independently in a remote environment



Compensation



Competitive monthly salary based on experience



Performance bonuses tied to deal volume and accuracy



Growth Opportunity



This position offers the opportunity to work directly with the capital advisory team and gain exposure to commercial finance transactions, debt restructuring, and private credit structuring.



Top performers may advance into Senior Credit Analyst or Underwriting Manager roles.

title: Credit Analyst (Commercial Finance)
description:

**Company:** Modavva Capital

**Location:** Remote / Offshore

**Employment Type:** Full-Time



---



About Modavva Capital



Modavva Capital is a capital advisory and structured finance firm specializing in helping small and mid-sized businesses restructure high-cost debt and access institutional capital solutions. Our team works with banks, private credit funds, and specialty lenders to structure refinancing solutions for businesses experiencing cash flow pressure.



We are seeking a detail-oriented **Credit Analyst** to support our underwriting and deal structuring team.



---



### Position Overview



The Credit Analyst will be responsible for analyzing financial information, calculating debt service coverage ratios (DSCR), evaluating business performance, and preparing underwriting summaries for potential lenders.



This role plays a key part in determining whether a business qualifies for refinancing or restructuring solutions.



---



### Key Responsibilities



**Financial Analysis**



* Review business tax returns, profit and loss statements, and balance sheets

* Calculate Debt Service Coverage Ratio (DSCR)

* Analyze revenue trends and profitability

* Identify owner addbacks such as salary and depreciation



**Debt & Cash Flow Analysis**



* Prepare debt schedules for existing obligations

* Evaluate merchant cash advance (MCA) debt stacks

* Calculate current and projected debt service payments

* Identify opportunities for refinancing or restructuring



**Collateral Evaluation**



* Review collateral including equipment, receivables, and real estate

* Estimate lendable value based on advance rates



**Underwriting Support**



* Prepare credit summaries and deal memos

* Build financial models for potential loan structures

* Assist with lender packaging and submission preparation



**Data Management**



* Maintain deal records within the company CRM

* Organize financial documents for underwriting review



---



### Qualifications



**Required**



* Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or a related field

* Experience analyzing financial statements

* Strong understanding of business cash flow and profitability

* Advanced Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets skills



**Preferred**



* Experience in commercial lending, SBA underwriting, or financial analysis

* Familiarity with DSCR calculations and loan underwriting

* Experience analyzing merchant cash advance debt structures



---



### Skills



* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

* High attention to detail

* Ability to interpret financial statements

* Strong organizational skills

* Ability to work independently in a remote environment



---



### Compensation



* Competitive monthly salary based on experience

* Performance bonuses tied to deal volume and accuracy



---



### Growth Opportunity



This position offers the opportunity to work directly with the capital advisory team and gain exposure to commercial finance transactions, debt restructuring, and private credit structuring.



Top performers may advance into **Senior Credit Analyst or Underwriting Manager roles.**

title: COST & FIXED ASSET ACCOUNTANT
description:
JOB SUMMARY:

A Cost & Fixed Asset Accountant is responsible for maintaining the accuracy of an organization’s capital assets and production costs



QUALIFICATIONS:

A Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field is required

Generally 3–5 years of experience, with a focus on manufacturing, capital-intensive environments, and month-end/year-end closing

Deep understanding of fixed asset life cycles, capitalization policies, depreciation methods (straight-line, accelerated), and impairment.

Proficiency in standard and actual costing, variance analysis (material, labor, overhead), and Bill of Materials (BOM)

Knowledge of GAAP/IFRS standards, specifically regarding asset capitalization

title: Part-time or Full-time Home-based ESL Tutor
description:
Longone, a leading provider of ESL education in China since 2017, is seeking dedicated and innovative educators to join our expanding team of home-based teachers. Due to strong and consistent student demand, our current teaching schedule is fully booked, and we are actively recruiting additional qualified teachers to meet this growing need.



1. About the Role

As an online tutor, you will conduct one-on-one English lessons with both children and adults in China. Depending on the number of classes booked, you can earn between 10,000 and 50,000 pesos per month. Outstanding performance may lead to further opportunities within the company.



2. Key Responsibilities

Deliver engaging and interactive English lessons.

Tailor lesson plans creatively to suit students’ needs.

Use effective teaching aids and techniques.

Foster a positive learning environment for both children and adults.



3. Compensation and Schedule

Competitive rates: 70–90 pesos per 25-minute class.

Flexible schedules available for both part-time and full-time positions.



4. Requirements

Bachelor’s degree (Education, Communication, or related fields preferred).

Excellent English communication skills.

Energetic and creative teaching style, with effective use of gestures.

NBI clearance.



5. Technical Requirements

Desktop or laptop computer.

Headset with microphone and noise-canceling feature.

Wired internet connection (minimum 5 Mbps).

Quiet, well-lit teaching environment.



6. Application Process

If you are interested in joining our team, please submit your application via Microsoft Teams (formerly known as
) by contacting us at  Microsoft Teams (formerly known as
) ID: d690e5e26dd8c968



We look forward to welcoming passionate educators to our team!

title: Elite Fillipino Business Assistant
description:
We’re looking for someone far beyond a traditional VA.



This is not a task-doer role. This is a strategic, AI-powered, problem-solving position for someone who thrives on challenges, adapts fast, and loves building, improving, and innovating.



If you are fluent in Generative AI, strong in web development and web design, and confident communicating in English at a professional level — keep reading.



### What You’ll Do



• Use Generative AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Midjourney, automation platforms, etc.) to streamline workflows and create leverage

• Design, build, and optimize websites (front-end and back-end familiarity required)

• Improve systems, suggest automations, and eliminate inefficiencies

• Execute marketing, branding, and digital initiatives

• Handle operations and strategic support tasks

• Adapt quickly when priorities shift

• Solve problems independently without waiting for step-by-step instructions



### Who You Are



• Based in the Philippines

• Fluent in written and spoken English

• Highly proficient with Generative AI tools

• Strong background in web development (HTML, CSS, JS, CMS platforms, etc.)

• Skilled in web design (UX/UI thinking, layout, branding awareness)

• Tech-forward and resourceful

• Thrive under pressure and ambiguity

• Think like an operator, not just an assistant

• Naturally proactive — you bring solutions, not just questions



### Bonus Points If You Have



• Experience with automation tools (Zapier, Make, APIs)

• Advanced SEO and "SEO for Chatbot" proficiency

• Copywriting skills

• Funnel building experience

• Experience working with founders or fast-growing startups



### What You’ll Get



• Long-term opportunity with room to grow

• Competitive compensation (based on experience)

• Autonomy and trust

• Exposure to and potential collaboration with cutting-edge AI implementation

• A role where your ideas matter

• Equity



If you’re the type who sees a messy system and immediately thinks, “I can improve this,” we want to meet you.



To apply, send:



1. A short introduction about yourself

2. Links to websites or projects you’ve built

3. A brief explanation of how you use Generative AI in your workflow

4. Your expected monthly rate (at 20 hrs/week and 40 hrs/week)

5. A one page strategic outline for maximizing visibility and reach using a spearhead approach for an AI solutions + visual media production solutions hybrid company for Q1 and Q2 of 2026. Assume that everything is poised for launch except for web design and web development, and that hiring a top-tier Framer designer to create a replica of 
 for a budget no more than $200 is top priority. (Framer templates Portfolite, Fuel, and Viper are useful templates to suggest for use as jumpoff points)

6. If you are able to deliver a mockup of the full, functioning, Framer site as part of a work sample of "what you can do" in your application, there is a >80% chance you will receive a job offer, starting at a base of $8/hr (the very minimum; unlikely given commensurate expertise.) 



We’re looking for someone sharp, innovative, and hungry to grow. If that’s you, apply for the paid trial run. 

If selected, where it goes from there is up to you--the sky is the limit.

title: AI Automation Developer | Up to $15/hr | US Hours
description:
Hello there! I'm looking for an AI Automation Developer who can build powerful workflows that remove manual work and improve operational efficiency. This role focuses on designing, implementing, and maintaining automation and AI-assisted systems that directly impact how the business runs day-to-day.



Details:

– $6.16–$15/hour (based on experience and technical depth)

– Part-time

– US business hours

– Remote



What You’ll Do:

– Build and manage automations using n8n

– Design end-to-end workflows with APIs, webhooks, and structured logic

– Implement error handling, monitoring, and optimisation processes

– Build AI-assisted workflows using Azure OpenAI / ChatGPT APIs

– Automate document processing,
 flows, and internal ticket intelligence

– Manage SharePoint structures and Microsoft 365 data flows

– Integrate systems such as Xero, Formitize, AnyTrack, and job management tools

– Create clear documentation and continuously improve system reliability



Good Fit If You:

– Have strong hands-on experience with n8n (required)

– Understand APIs, JSON, and webhook integrations

– Can write JavaScript for automation logic

– Have Microsoft 365 / SharePoint experience

– Have worked with Azure or AI platforms

– Think in structured systems and proactively identify improvements

– Communicate clearly in English and work independently



To Apply:

Send a short message and include AUTOMATION and your years of experience using n8n in the title.

title: Full-Time Customer Service Representative/Social Media Manager (with Airbnb & Social Media Experience)
description:
Please apply only if you have experience with Airbnb and as a Social Media Manager.



We are looking for a full-time Customer Service Representative to manage our Airbnb listings and guest communications. This role also requires strong skills in social media content creation to promote our properties.



Responsibilities:



Manage guest inquiries, bookings, and communications across Airbnb, 
, Agoda, and other platforms.



Handle reservations, cancellations, and guest support before, during, and after stays.



Create and post engaging social media content (posts, reels, shorts, etc.) to boost visibility and bookings.



Monitor and respond to social media comments and messages.



Assist with marketing strategies for growth and occupancy.



Visit the properties at least once a month to check unit conditions and report.



Qualifications:



Experience with Airbnb, Agoda, 
, and other short-term rental platforms (required).



Proven skills in social media management and content creation.



Excellent written and spoken English communication.



Must be based in CALABARZON for monthly property visits.



Organized, detail-oriented, proactive, and reliable.



Full-time only — no other clients or work commitments.



Work Setup & Compensation:



Full-time, remote with occasional site visits.



Exclusive commitment required.



Salary: 20,000 – ?25,000/month, depending on experience.



To apply, please send your Resume/CV and samples of social media work here.

title: Book keeper
description:
Real Estate & Airbnb Bookkeeper (Part-Time – Long Term)



We are a growing U.S.-based real estate investment and short-term rental company looking for an experienced bookkeeper to manage financial records for our portfolio of properties.



We specialize in:

 • Short-term rentals (Airbnb / VRBO)

 • Mid-term rentals

 • Fix and flip projects

 • Long-term holds



This is a long-term position for someone who is organized, detail-oriented, and understands real estate financial flows.



Responsibilities:

 • Reconcile multiple bank accounts and credit cards monthly

 • Categorize income and expenses correctly

 • Track revenue by property

 • Separate cleaning fees, platform fees, management fees, etc.

 • Prepare monthly P&L per property

 • Track owner distributions and reserves

 • Assist with 1099 reporting preparation

 • Flag unusual expenses or discrepancies

 • Maintain clean and organized financial records



2+ years bookkeeping experience

 • Experience with QuickBooks Online (required)

 • Experience in real estate bookkeeping (preferred)

 • Experience with Airbnb / STR accounting (highly preferred)

 • Understanding of income vs passthrough expenses

 • Strong Excel / Google Sheets skills



Bonus:

 • Experience with U.S. tax reporting (1099)

 • Experience with property management companies





20 hours per month

 • Must complete monthly close by the 5th of each month

 • Some overlap with U.S. business hours required

 • Long-term position

title: Lead Manager - Land Investing
description:
Real estate investment firm specializing in land acquisition and development is seeking a driven and personable Lead Manager to join our team. This role offers significant growth potential, including the opportunity to transition to full-time hours and eventually make offers on deals.



Responsibilities:

-Conduct first calls with leads generated by our SMS marketing team to qualify interest and gather essential property information.

-Perform warm calling to re-engage leads that haven't been booked or have fallen out of the pipeline.

-Run initial intake meetings with prospects to collect critical details including: purchase year, utility situation, deed status, building/development status, and seller's desired price.

-Qualify leads and schedule proposal calls with the acquisition team for deals that meet our criteria.

-Push leads quickly that are high priority

-Maintain accurate and up-to-date records in our CRM system (Stride).

-Use a friendly yet direct approach to build rapport while efficiently extracting key information from sellers.

-Collaborate with the team to optimize lead conversion and deal flow.

-Opportunity to progress into making offers on properties as experience and tenure grow.

Requirements:



-Prior experience in sales and conducting phone-based meetings; ability to handle both inbound and outbound calls effectively.

-Strong communication skills with the ability to be personable, direct, and consultative in conversations.

-Open to being trained

-Proven ability to qualify leads and extract critical information during discovery calls.

-Self-motivated and comfortable working independently with minimal supervision.

-Excellent organizational and time management skills.

-Ability to learn quickly and adapt to training on land investing specifics.

-Comfortable using CRM systems to track leads and activities - Familiarity with Stride CRM is advantageous.



Preferred Qualifications:

Prior experience in real estate sales, particularly land investing, is strongly preferred.

Background in real estate wholesaling or cold calling is a plus.

Knowledge of land due diligence and property evaluation.



Compensation:

Starting rate: $5/hour with opportunity to grow

Initial schedule: 20 hours per week with strong potential to grow to 40 hours/week (full-time)

Performance-based bonuses and deal-closed incentives available after established tenure with the company

Clear path for advancement and increased responsibility, including opportunity to make offers



What We're Looking For:

A curious, coachable tea
mber who is excited about building something meaningful in the land investing space. You should be comfortable having exploratory conversations, asking the right questions, and identifying opportunities. This is an excellent opportunity for someone looking to grow their career in real estate investing with a company that values development and promotion from within.



To Apply: 

Please include your favorite food in your message and title of message. 

Also, send a recording from a call, role-play, or conversation.

title: Video Editor/Social media team member
description:
**High-Performance Video Editor & Social Media Officer (Remote – Philippines)**

**Part-Time | 20 Hours Per Week | AUD $8 per Hour**



Nationwide Migration and Education is a fast-scaling Australian migration consultancy based in Brisbane. We are building a dominant digital presence in the migration industry through educational, authority-driven video content across YouTube, TikTok, Instagram,
, and LinkedIn.



We are not looking for an average editor.



We are looking for someone who understands growth, speed, quality, and accountability.



If you are creative, data-driven, disciplined, and serious about long-term growth — this role is for you.



—————————————————————————



### Your Mission



Your core objective is simple:



Help us grow brand authority, engagement, and leads through powerful video content and structured marketing execution.



We produce high-quality 4K educational content focused on employer-sponsored visas, skilled migration, and business migration pathways.



—————————————————————————



### Performance Expectations (KPIs)



• Repurpose long-form YouTube videos into 5–6 short-form videos per recording session

• Support production of up to 30–40 short-form videos per month

• Deliver edited content within agreed turnaround times

• Improve hook quality, retention rate, and watch time

• Contribute ideas that increase engagement and inbound enquiries



This is a performance-based culture. We track output and quality.



—————————————————————————



### Key Responsibilities



**1. Advanced Video Editing**

• Edit 4K footage using Adobe Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve

• Add captions, dynamic hooks, transitions, branding, zoom cuts

• Create short-form content for Reels, TikTok, Shorts

• Design engaging thumbnails

• Ensure clean, professional, authority-style edits



**2. Social Media & Marketing Execution**

• Assist in planning monthly content calendars

• Research migration-related trends

• Analyse performance metrics and suggest improvements

• Assist with posting and scheduling across platforms

• Support website and funnel optimisation suggestions



**3. Growth Contribution**

• Provide a structured 30-day marketing action plan

• Suggest strategies to increase brand visibility

• Think beyond editing — think growth



—————————————————————————



### Technical & Work Requirements



• Minimum 16GB RAM

• High-speed, stable internet connection

• Backup plan for power outages (generator, co-working space, etc.)

• Must be comfortable sharing screen during working hours

• Strong time management and communication skills



—————————————————————————



### Compensation



• AUD $8 per hour

• 20 hours per week

• Long-term opportunity for growth

• Two weeks’ salary held as bond (released at completion of contract)



High performers may receive increased hours and performance-based incentives.



—————————————————————————



### Application Process (Strict)



Incomplete applications will NOT be reviewed.



Please
 
 with:



1. A 5–10 minute Loom video explaining:

• Your editing experience (Adobe Premiere / DaVinci)

• Specific measurable results you achieved for other businesses

• Why you believe you are suited for a high-performance environment



2. Screenshots of:

• Internet speed test

• Proof of minimum 16GB RAM



3. Explain clearly how you handle power or internet interruptions.



4. Submit a 30-day marketing strategy tailored to Nationwide Migration and Education after reviewing our platforms.



—————————————————————————



Review our platforms before applying:



: [www.
/Nationwidemigrationandeducation](
)

TikTok: [
](
)

Instagram: sumandua_migrationadvisor

LinkedIn: [www.
/in/suman-dua
](

](
)



—————————————————————————



We are building a serious brand in the migration industry.

If you want to grow with a structured, performance-driven Australian business — apply.

title: Lead Manager - Real Estate (land investing)
description:
Real Estate Lead Manager

Land Investing — BT Land Group



ABOUT US

BT Land Group is a growing real estate investment firm focused on land acquisition. We’re a small, hands-on team building something meaningful from the ground up — and we’re looking for someone to grow with us from day one. You won’t just be a hire; you’ll be our first Lead Manager, working directly alongside the founder on the acquisition side. If you’re hungry, coachable, and excited by the idea of eventually leading a team you helped build, this role is for you.



RESPONSIBILITIES

Your primary focus will be conducting intake meetings with motivated land sellers — gathering the information we need to evaluate and move on deals quickly. Secondary to that, you’ll handle warm outbound calling to re-engage leads who previously responded to our marketing but haven’t yet booked or moved forward in the pipeline.

Primary — Intake Meetings:

Run initial intake meetings with sellers to collect critical details: purchase year, utility situation, deed status, building/development status, and seller’s desired price

Qualify leads and schedule proposal calls with the acquisition team for deals that meet our criteria

Maintain accurate and up-to-date records in Stride CRM

Secondary — Warm Outbound Calling:

Re-engage qualified leads who responded to our marketing but haven’t booked or have fallen out of the pipeline

Use a friendly, direct approach to build rapport and move leads forward efficiently

Growth Path — Making Offers:

As you learn the business, you’ll have the opportunity to begin making offers directly. This means:

Purchasing undervalued land directly from sellers on behalf of the company

Speaking with multiple sellers about multiple different properties each day

Making a high volume of offers as part of a disciplined acquisition strategy



REQUIREMENTS

Prior experience in sales and phone-based outreach — comfortable handling both inbound and outbound conversations

Excellent spoken and written English

Strong communication skills: personable, direct, and consultative

Self-motivated and able to work independently with minimal supervision

Organized with strong time management habits

Willing to learn — open to training on land investing specifics

Eager to grow with the business and take on increasing responsibility over time

Reliable high-speed internet connection and a quiet, professional workspace

Available during US Eastern (EST) business hours



TOOLS YOU’LL USE

Stride CRM — your primary hub for tracking leads, logging call notes, and managing your pipeline (phone dialer is built into Stride)


 — team communication and day-to-day coordination

Land Portal / LAND ID — GIS mapping tools used to evaluate land during seller calls



COMPENSATION

Starting rate: $5/hour

Schedule: 30 hours per week to start, ramping to 40 hours within your first month

Bonuses: Performance-based bonuses become available after 4 months of consistent, quality work

Growth: Clear path to increased responsibilities including making offers, and the potential to one day lead the team



WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

We’re looking for someone curious, coachable, and genuinely excited about building something together. You’ll be working directly with me (the founder) on the acquisition side of the business — you’re not joining a big company with layers of management. You’re joining a lean operation where your work directly moves the needle. The right person is someone who sees this not just as a job, but as a chance to learn the business deeply and potentially grow into a leadership role as the team expands.



TO APPLY

Please send a message with a voice recording of a previous call (or introduction of yourself if you do not have) and a brief introduction on why you would want this job. To confirm you’ve read this entire posting carefully, include your favorite food in your message. Applications without this will not be considered.

title: Facebook ads coordinator
description:
HEADLINE: JOIN FUN SMART SUNGLASSES COMPANY AS A FULL-TIME
 ADS COORDINATOR

PAY: PHP  30,000 - 40,000/mo + BONUS BASED ON EXPERIENCE



Chamelo is a cutting-edge smart eyewear company that enables wearers to instantly adjust lens tint and color, blending technology, style, and versatility. With Chamelo Lens Technology, the brand champions adaptability and self-expression. NBA legend Stephon Marbury serves as Chief Brand Officer, embodying the innovative spirit of Chamelo’s mission: “Be Different. See Different.”



As Chamelo continues its growth, with celebrities like Shaquille O’Neal already endorsing its products, the company is building a global team across the U.S., Philippines, Belgium, Hong Kong, Shenzhen, and Shanghai. Chamelo offers an exciting, dynamic culture where hard work meets fun.



If you reply to this job post, incorporate &quot
 ADS COORDINATOR Ready!” in the subject line.



Help Chamelo revolutionize eyewear by managing influencer collaborations, conducting research, and contributing your writing and communication skills to support our fast-paced and innovative team!



JOB DESCRIPTION:
 ADS COORDINATOR

We’re seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented
 ADS COORDINATOR to streamline our marketing processes and drive efficiency. In this role, you’ll manage campaign execution, oversee marketing tools, analyze performance metrics, and collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure seamless operations. Your expertise will support the optimization of workflows, technology, and data to achieve marketing goals.

-Execute and refine Meta ad campaigns that optimize for lead generation and purchase conversion

-Manage Meta Ads, Google Ads, Google Display Network, YouTube, Snapchat, Tiktok, X, Social Media campaigns and any other online channels to drive traffic to our website

-Develop reports on ad performance

-Assist on other miscellaneous eCommerce tasks including, but not limited to, Shopify, Amazon, Crowdfunding, etc.



Key Responsibilities:

Coordinate and support marketing campaigns and events

Manage marketing tools, CRM systems, and analytics dashboards

Track and analyze performance metrics to identify improvement opportunities

Optimize marketing workflows and ensure timely delivery of projects

Collaborate with creative, sales, and external vendors for project execution



Qualifications:

1+ year of experience in a marketing or coordination role

Strong organizational skills and the ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously.

Proficiency in using project management or marketing tools (e.g., Trello, Asana, HubSpot).

Basic understanding of digital marketing workflows and analytics.

Excellent written and verbal English communication skills.

High attention to detail and commitment to delivering high-quality work.

Reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace.

Proficiency in marketing platforms (e.g., Google Analytics, HubSpot, or similar).

Strong project management and organizational skills.

Excellent communication and teamwork abilities.

Analytical mindset with data interpretation skills (comfortable analyzing large datasets in excel and google sheets)



If you are interested in applying for this role, IN ADDITION TO REPLYING DIRECTLY TO THIS POST, please send your resume along with the answers to the following questions to chase AT chamelo DOT com and incorporate the words &quot
 ADS COORDINATOR Ready!” in the subject line:



If you could be one famous entrepreneur (alive or dead) who would you be and why?

One paragraph (5 sentences max) on any relevant experience you have

Your favorite travel hack

What are your key strengths? 

What are your weaknesses? 

Your desired number of weekly hours & desired start date

Your availability next week for a quick chat

Company Benefits:

We are looking for the best candidate to fill the position. If you’re the right person for the job, you may avail of the following:



Above market salary

Paid time off and paid holidays

13th month pay

Regular Performance bonus

Annual salary bonus/increases based on performance

The ability to work remotely

A fun work culture with company contests



We believe in having fun, experimentation and building a community where people are free to be creative and grow!



MOST IMPORTANTLY: We take care of our employees and consider them as part of the family.



We do not discriminate on the basis of race, sex, color, religion, age, national origin, marital status, disability, veteran status, genetic information, sexual orientation, gender identity or any other reason prohibited by law in provision of employment opportunities and benefits.

title: SEO rockstar
description:
Please read: I'm looking for an expert in SEO. A real one. Please don't waste my time and your application points if you know what SEO stands for. I've already had a couple of interviews with "SEO specialists" and can quickly determine when someone knows the topic and someone who pretends. 

We run multiple websites for our e-commerce business. We have a USA-based warehouse with close to 10,000 products. Our main website has around 100,000 visitors every month. I'm looking for someone to help me increase it to 200,000 with the same or better conversion rate. 

I'll ask you for proven results from your current customers. On-page SEO, link building, keyword analysis, and strategies—you have to be an expert in these. 

If you are - please apply and start your message/title "SEO Wizard". If you don't - I'd assume that you didn't read my description, so the application will be simply archived. 

For the right specialist, I'm ready to offer a competitive hourly rate plus result-based bonuses. 

Thank you.

title: Business Brokerage Operations Coordinator
description:
About Us

We are a US-based business brokerage firm operating under a nationally recognized franchise brand. We help business owners in New Jersey and New York sell their businesses, and we help buyers find and acquire the right opportunity. We use AI-powered research tools, modern CRM systems, and multi-channel outreach to operate at a level far above a typical small brokerage.



We are hiring our first full-time virtual assistant to be a core part of the team from day one. This is not a side role — you will be deeply involved in building the business alongside the broker. If you are reliable, detail-oriented, and want to grow with a fast-moving operation, this is an excellent opportunity.



What You Will Do

You will manage prospect databases, execute multi-channel outreach campaigns, coordinate appointments, maintain CRM systems, and support deal administration. You work directly with the broker and AI-powered research tools to identify and engage potential business sellers and buyers.



Key Responsibilities

Prospecting & Outreach

• Build and maintain prospect databases using state business registrations, Google Maps data, and AI-generated target lists

• Execute direct mail campaigns: print, prepare, and mail personalized letters to business owners

• Manage
 drip sequences using Mailchimp or Brevo: setup, monitoring, response tracking

• Track LinkedIn outreach activity and manage connection/follow-up logs

• Make initial cold calls to prospects using provided scripts; warm transfer to broker when appropriate



CRM & Data Management

• Maintain CRM records with accurate, current data: contact info, status updates, pipeline tracking

• Manage project boards and task tracking in Notion

• Generate weekly pipeline reports and KPI dashboards

• Keep buyer database current with budget, industry preference, financing status, and timeline



Deal Administration

• Distribute NDAs to interested buyers and track execution status

• Format and distribute CIMs (Confidential Information Memorandums) to qualified buyers

• Coordinate document collection from sellers (tax returns, P&Ls, lease copies, equipment lists)

• Schedule and confirm appointments between broker and prospects/clients

• Track deal milestones and send status updates to both parties



Position Details

Location Remote (Philippines-based)

Schedule 40 hours/week — 8:00 AM to 12:00 PM US Eastern overlap required; remaining hours flexible

Compensation $Up to 7/hour USD ($900–1,200/month) — based on experience

Start Date Immediate — 2-week paid trial before full commitment

Reports To Broker / Owner (direct, daily communication)



Required Qualifications

• College degree (any field)

• Strong written and spoken English — will be tested during interview with a writing exercise

• 1+ years experience in real estate admin, lead generation, data entry, or virtual assistance

• Proficient with Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Gmail, Calendar, Drive)

• Proficient with Notion (pages, databases, task boards, templates)

• Experience with CRM systems (HubSpot, Salesforce, Airtable, or similar)

• Comfortable learning new tools quickly (Canva, Loom,
 marketing platforms)

• Reliable high-speed internet connection and quiet workspace

• Available during 8:00 AM – 12:00 PM US Eastern Time (remaining hours are flexible)



Preferred Qualifications

• Experience supporting US-based real estate or business brokerage firms

• Familiarity with BizBuySell, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, or business marketplace platforms

• Basic graphic design skills (Canva, simple layout and formatting work)

• Experience managing
 marketing campaigns (Mailchimp, Brevo, or similar)

• Prior experience building prospect lists or running outreach campaigns



Tools You Will Use Daily

Tool What You Use It For

Google Workspace
, calendar, document storage, spreadsheets

Notion Project management, task tracking, SOPs, meeting notes, databases

HubSpot / Airtable Prospect pipeline, outreach tracking, CRM

Mailchimp or Brevo
 drip sequences and campaign tracking

Canva Direct mail design, CIM formatting, simple graphics

Loom Watching training videos, recording screen walkthroughs

Slack or WhatsApp Daily communication with broker

Zoom Weekly video check-ins



How We Hire

We move fast. The entire process takes 5–7 business days.



Step 1: Written English Assessment

We will send you a short
 drafting exercise. This tests your writing quality, attention to detail, and professionalism. Takes about 15 minutes.



Step 2: Video Interview (30 minutes)

A Zoom call to discuss your experience, communication skills, and problem-solving approach. Come prepared to talk about your past work with CRM systems and outreach campaigns.



Step 3: Paid Test Task

Build a prospect list of 25 businesses from Google Maps with specific data points we provide. This is paid work — we compensate you for your time regardless of outcome. Takes approximately 2–3 hours.



Step 4: 2-Week Paid Trial

Full onboarding with training videos and SOPs. You work on real tasks at your full hourly rate. At the end of two weeks, we both d
 if it is a good fit.



Why This Role Is Different

• You are the first hire — not one of twenty VAs in a pool. You will have a direct, daily relationship with the broker and real ownership of your work.

• We use AI tools extensively. You will not be doing mindless data entry — AI handles research and drafting. Your job is execution, coordination, and quality control.

• The business is launching now. You will help build it from the ground up. If you perform well, there is room to grow into a team lead role as the operation scales.

• Clear SOPs and training from Day 1. We do not throw you in without support. Every process has a Loom video walkthrough and written documentation.



How to Apply

Send a message that includes:

• A brief introduction (2–3 sentences about your relevant experience)

• Your experience with CRM systems — which ones, what you did with them

• Your experience with Notion — how you have used it (databases, project boards, etc.)

• Your English proficiency level and timezone

• Your hourly rate expectation (USD)

• When you can start



Applications that are clearly generic or copy-pasted will be skipped. We read every message carefully and respond within 24–48 hours.

title: Virtual Executive Assistant, Operations, Marketing, Sales and Support Manager
description:
Virtual Executive Assistant, Operations, Marketing, Sales and Support Manager



Must have exceptional English speaking skills



Part-Time | $3-$5 per hour - 20-30 Hours per week | 7 AM – 8 PM PST

Paid Holidays | Vacation | Bonus Opportunities | Merit Increases



This is a part time position that will become full time for the right person.



Are you the kind of person who takes pride in being the backbone of an organization—keeping operations tight, finances accurate, schedules aligned, and the CEO supported at the highest level? Do people describe you as proactive, resourceful, organized, and exceptionally dependable? If so, you may be the superstar we’re looking for.
