title: SEO & Lead Generation Specialist
description:
SEO & Lead Generation Specialist



We’re looking for a results-driven SEO & Lead Generation Specialist who understands how rankings turn into real business growth — not just traffic.



Our goal is simple:

Drive qualified inbound calls and messages through organic search.



This role is execution-focused. We are not looking for an agency-level strategist. We want someone hands-on, analytical, and proactive.



Responsibilities

- Execute on-page and off-page SEO strategies

- Conduct keyword research and competitor analysis

- Optimize website pages (titles, meta descriptions, internal linking, structure)

- Perform technical SEO audits

- Build and manage backlink strategies

- Improve local SEO visibility

- Optimize Google Business Profile (if applicable)

- Create and optimize landing pages designed to drive calls and inquiries

- Improve conversion rates (forms, CTAs, click-to-call buttons)

- Track traffic, keyword rankings, calls, and message conversions

- Use AI tools to improve research, optimization, and workflow efficiency





Requirements

- Proven SEO experience

- Experience generating real inbound leads (calls, form submissions, inquiries)

- Strong knowledge of Google Search Console & Google Analytics

- Familiar with Ahrefs, SEMrush, or similar tools

- Understanding of conversion optimization

- Comfortable using AI tools

- Strong execution skills

- Self-starter, deadline-driven





What We Offer

- Full-time role

- Day shift schedule (PH time)

- Paid Philippine holidays

- 13th month pay

- Supportive, non-toxic team culture

- Collaborative environment — you won’t be doing everything alone. We value ownership, accountability, and people who care about measurable results.



Application Questions (Required)

Please answer the following thoughtfully. Generic answers will not be considered.

1. Tell us about a real SEO project you personally handled.

What was the website’s situation before, what actions did you take, and what measurable results did you achieve (traffic, rankings, calls, leads)?

(We want numbers.)

2. If you were hired today, what would be your exact 30-day SEO + lead generation action plan to increase inbound calls and inquiries?

Be specific. Step-by-step.

3. How do you turn organic traffic into qualified inbound calls or messages?

Explain your strategy beyond just increasing traffic.

title: Online Science Teachers (Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy:

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description:

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online Elementary Science Teachers with strong backgrounds in Science Education. The ideal candidates will have experience teaching young learners (ages 5–15) and are committed to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities:

Deliver interactive and engaging Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–15.

Teach using internationally recognized Science curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, and project-based STEM resources.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on scientific inquiry, critical thinking, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract science concepts accessible and exciting.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Encourage curiosity, discussion, and experimentation in a safe and supportive learning space.



Qualifications:

Professional Teacher with at least 2 years of experience teaching Science (Kindergarten–Grade 9) and verifiable teaching certifications (e.g., Teaching License, TESOL/TEFL is a plus).

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, or General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based teaching methods and interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 17:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends) GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Preferred Experience:

Familiarity with science curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, or NGSS-aligned materials.

Ability to guide students in basic lab simulations, scientific writing, and reading nonfiction science texts.

Experience using visual organizers, anchor charts, and online science tools to enrich understanding.



Benefits:

Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Science curriculums.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency.

, LinkedIn, company website)

title: Phone Receptionist / Patient Resource Coordinator
description:
Organization Overview



The National Pancreatic Cancer Foundation (NPCF) is a nonprofit cancer organization dedicated to providing resources, education, and support services to pancreatic cancer patients and their families throughout the United States. We are often the first point of contact for individuals navigating one of the most difficult times in their lives. Compassion, professionalism, and accuracy are essential in this role.



Position Summary



The Receptionist / Patient Resource Coordinator serves as the first voice and primary contact for callers seeking information, support, and guidance. This individual will professionally manage incoming calls, provide accurate resource information, route calls appropriately, and ensure each caller is treated with empathy and respect.



 “You are often the first voice someone hears - compassion matters.” 



A medical background is a plus, particularly experience in oncology, patient navigation, healthcare administration, or medical front office environments.



Key Responsibilities

Call Management & Communication



Answer incoming calls promptly and professionally using the approved organizational greeting 



Provide information regarding organizational resources, clinical trials listings, and support services 



Assist donors with processing credit card donations over the phone and provide mailing information for mailed contributions 



Transfer calls accurately to appropriate staff members, including leadership, integrative therapies, and grief support contacts 



Provide compassionate, patient-centered communication to individuals affected by cancer



Listen actively and respond with empathy to patients, caregivers, and family members



Guide callers to appropriate support resources and educational materials



Maintain confidentiality and professionalism at all times





Administrative Support



Maintain accurate message logs and call documentation



Keep contact information and resource links readily accessible

title: Tableau Reporting Specialist
description:
Company: Australian accessories company (retail and wholesale)

Remote

Full Time - 40 hours per week

9am-5pm AEST, Mon-Fri

$200 USD per week



We are looking for a Tableau Reporting Specialist to transform data into meaningful insights that drive business decisions across our digital and eCommerce landscape.



About the Role

As a Tableau Reporting Specialist, you’ll be responsible for building, maintaining, and enhancing reporting dashboards that support performance tracking, customer insights, and operational decision-making. You’ll work closely with cross-functional teams to ensure data accuracy, streamline reporting processes, and support our fast-paced digital growth strategy.



What You’ll Do

- Design, build, and maintain interactive dashboards in Tableau

- Extract and transform data from multiple sources (SAP, BI tools, Google Analytics, Shopify, etc.).

- Partner with Digital, Marketing, and eCommerce teams to deliver clear,

actionable insights

- Automate and optimise regular reporting processes

- Support ad hoc analysis and performance deep dives



What You’ll Need

- 2+ years of experience in data analysis and reporting, ideally within digital or eCommerce environments

- Proficiency in Tableau and data integration from platforms like SAP, Google Analytics, and Shopify

- Strong SQL skills and data storytelling abilities

- Excellent attention to detail and problem-solving mindset

- Ability to communicate insights clearly to technical and non-technical audiences



To Apply:

- Please share your most updated CV

- Answer the following questions in your application



1. Describe the most advanced Tableau dashboard you have built.

Include:



-The data sources used (e.g., Shopify, GA4, SAP, SQL, etc.)

-Any calculated fields, LOD expressions, parameters, or data blending used

-The business objective

-The measurable impact or outcome



2. Write a sample SQL query that calculates total monthly revenue and average order value from a sales table.

(Assume the table includes: order_id, order_date, customer_id, and total_amount.)



3. If revenue dropped by 20% last month for an eCommerce retail brand, explain your step-by-step approach to identifying the root cause.

Be specific about the metrics and breakdowns you would analyse (e.g., traffic, conversion rate, AOV, channel performance, customer segments, etc.).

title: Credit Repair VA

title: Lead Full-Stack Engineer (Mobile + Payments) – Founding Team
description:
The Mission:

We are a high-growth digital advertising agency. We are moving from "services" to "products" and need a technical leader to build and own our mobile ecosystem. You aren't just an employee; you are the lead architect of our tools and applications.



What You Will Own:



Full-Stack Mobile: Architecting and deploying iOS and Android apps using a single-codebase framework (Flutter or React Native).



Payments & Logic: Implementing complex payment flows (Stripe, Apple In-App Purchases, RevenueCat) and ensuring 100% security and reliability.



UI/UX Leadership: Designing clean, high-converting interfaces in Figma and translating them into pixel-perfect code.



AI Integration: Utilizing Cursor and Claude to build at 10x speed, while maintaining high code quality and internal documentation.



Requirements:



Experience: 5+ years in full-stack dev, with at least 2 years leading a team or shipping solo apps from 0 to 1.



Mobile: Expert in Flutter (preferred for 2026 performance) or React Native.



Backend/DevOps: Mastery of Supabase, Firebase, or PostgreSQL; comfortable with serverless functions and rapid deployment.



Design: You have a "design eye." You can take a rough concept and make it look premium without a dedicated designer.



Ad-Tech Knowledge: You understand pixels, postbacks, and how to integrate tracking APIs (Meta/Google).



The "Alpha" Requirement:

We don't do slow. You must be an expert in "Vibe Coding"—using AI tools to bypass the boring parts of development so you can focus on the hard logic and user experience.

title: HIGH PAY GRC IT ANALYST & AI Real-Time Rendering Specialist
description:
The Opportunity

We are looking for a rare "Hybrid" talent—someone who is deeply knowledgeable in IT Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC) and simultaneously proficient in Live AI Video Rendering.



This is a confidential project where you will act as a Technical Proxy in live, camera-on interviews for GRC Analyst roles. You will be using my identity and voice via real-time AI tools. If you are a tech wizard who knows how to navigate a NIST framework while managing a GPU-heavy AI stream, this is for you.



The Role

Technical Proxy: Represent the identity in live video interviews using real-time AI video-mirroring and voice conversion.



GRC Subject Matter Expert: Answer complex technical questions regarding ISO 27001, NIST, SOC2, HIPAA, and AI Risk Management.



AI Operator: Manage real-time AI tools (DeepFaceLive, RVC, or similar) with zero-to-minimal latency.



Technical Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

GRC Expertise: You must be well-versed in Risk Assessments, Gap Analysis, Vendor Risk Management, and Compliance Auditing and Demonstrate mastery of GRC frameworks (ISO 27001, NIST, SOC2, HIPAA, AI Risk).



AI Proficiency: Expert-level knowledge of real-time face-swapping and RVC (Retrieval-based Voice Conversion) tools.



Hardware: You must have access to a PC with a high-end GPU (NVIDIA RTX 30-series or 40-series) OR the proven ability to set up and stream via a Cloud GPU (RunPod, Vast.ai, etc.).



Compensation & Future Growth

Per Interview Session: $10 USD per session (45–60 mins).



Success Bonus: $1,000 USD  paid immediately upon a successful hire.



Volume: We are looking to fill two positions, meaning a potential for $2,000 USD in bonuses for the right candidate.



Future Work: Upon successful completion of these placements, we will move into a long-term partnership. You will be retained for future AI and GRC technical work at highly competitive, negotiated rates.



How to Apply

To be considered, please provide the following:



The word GRC 



A copy of your resume



Experience: A brief summary of your experience with GRC frameworks.



Hardware: Confirm your PC specs (GPU/CPU) or access you have or describe your experience using Cloud GPU rentals for live streaming.



Voice Sample: Attach a short audio recording of you speaking in English (Professional/Corporate tone).

title: Outbound Sales Representative
description:
Overview

We are seeking a high-energy, execution-focused Outbound Sales Representative to join the team at Earthside Farms. Based in New York City, we are a "better-for-you" snack brand offering clean-label candied nuts and organic dried mangoes to major distributors and retail partners.



This is a pure execution role with high activity, clear metrics, and no fluff. You will be responsible for high-volume prospecting to engage cold leads, re-activate stalled accounts, and drive reorders from existing customers.



Work Structure & Requirements

Location: Remote (Must have a quiet, professional calling environment).

Schedule: Full-time, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM EST.

Requirement: Candidates must not have a concurrent full-time job to ensure total focus on hitting daily activity targets.

Tech Needs: Reliable high-speed internet and strong computer literacy to multitask across sales tools.



Key Responsibilities

Outbound Outreach: Execute high-volume outbound
s and daily cold calls to prospects and warm leads.

Account Management: Follow up with inactive accounts and call current customers to facilitate reorders, expansion, or reactivation.

Lead Response: Respond promptly to all inbound calls and
 inquiries.

CRM Discipline: Log all activity accurately in Salesforce, maintaining clean data and clear next steps for every lead.

Performance: Consistently hit daily activity targets and monthly pipeline goals.



Required Skills & Experience

Sales Background: Prior experience in outbound sales, inside sales, or lead generation.

Communication: Fluent English (reading, writing, and speaking) with the ability to write concise, non-spammy cold
s.

Phone Presence: Confident, natural delivery on the phone—no monotone script reading.

Resilience: Comfortable handling objections, basic discovery, and repetitive outreach.

Efficiency: Fast typing skills and high attention to detail.



Traits We Value

Metrics-Driven: Comfortable being measured by clear KPIs and pipeline creation.

Coachable: Open to feedback and a direct communicator who strictly follows the established sales process.

Reliable: Consistent and self-disciplined in a remote work setting.



To Apply

Please submit your resume along with a Loom video introducing yourself.

title: TRADER
description:
We're Building a Profit-Driven Prop Trading Team – High-Earn Potential, Firm CapitalWe're looking for skilled, consistent traders to join our performance-based team. We operate exclusively through top-tier prop firms (funded trader programs) — meaning you trade with the firm's large capital (up to $200K+ accounts), keep the majority of the profits you generate, and risk almost nothing personally.Key Focus: Pure Profit GenerationOur entire model is built around maximizing earnings — no salary fluff, just real profit splits (typically 80–90% yours after passing).

You pass a straightforward evaluation/challenge ? get funded ? trade live markets with big size ? withdraw your share weekly/bi-weekly.

The better you perform (consistent profits, solid risk management), the faster we scale your account size and payout percentage.

This is not "learning" or "hobby trading" — it's a high-reward setup for traders who can produce real, repeatable gains.



What We Offer / What You GetAccess to premium prop firm funded accounts (Forex, Indices, Futures, Crypto pairs — your choice).

80–90% profit share (industry-leading splits).

No personal capital at risk beyond a small evaluation fee (which we can discuss reimbursement for top performers).

Scaling plan: Hit targets ? unlock larger accounts ? earn more.

Support: Strategy feedback, risk rule optimization, community for serious traders only.



Who We're Looking For (Kar Odakl? Traders)Proven track record: Consistent profitability over months (show statements, Myfxbook, or prop payouts).

Strong discipline: Respect drawdown rules, no revenge trading, focus on high-probability setups.

Independent & motivated: You treat this like a business — profit is the only KPI.

Experience with prop challenges/funded accounts is a big plus (but not mandatory if you can prove edge).



If you're tired of grinding small personal accounts and ready to trade serious size for serious money, DM me with:Your trading style/markets

Recent performance proof

Why you think you'd crush it in a funded setup



Serious inquiries only — we're building a small, high-performing crew focused on one thing: stacking profits.

title: Business Operations, Data and Financial Analyst
description:
We are a growing Australian healthcare and NDIS disability services group operating residential care, home care, respite and staffing services. Labour is our largest cost and service delivery is our biggest revenue driver — so understanding our numbers is critical. 



We are looking for a highly analytical Business Operations & Data Analyst to help us build visibility across revenue, labour cost, occupancy, and profitability.



This is NOT a data entry role and not a general virtual assistant role. We are looking for someone who enjoys working with numbers, building dashboards, and helping leadership make better decisions. 



Responsibilities



You will work directly with the business owner and senior managers to build and maintain operational reports, visualisations and dashboards and be responsible for extracting data, interpreting, visualising and then presenting to the team.



We need someone that can make the complicated uncomplicated and easy to understand, has a commercial focus, and can communicate clearly and visualise data and set goals. From the data, you will set goals. 



For example - someone that can come in, take a look at the cost of us sending work to agency, analyse the cost of our own staff, and then visualise the dollar figure of lost revenue last week/fortnight on agency cost. 



Your work will include:



- Overtime reporting including hours, dollar value, reason analysis and interpreting further (eg. x% of overtime was avoidable)

- Agency spend tracking

- Labour cost per service line (taking into account all of our expenses and determining the actual cost of hours sold)

- Bed occupancy %

- Care minutes invoiced vs paid

- Hours delivered by funding source and building breakeven points (eg. x hours sold to x organisation for breakeven)

- Setting goals for rostering staff to visualise how many hours need to be sold to increase revenue etc

- Breakeven modelling

- Building structured Excel or dashboards

- Presenting and developing clear summaries and reports with visualisations and charts for management to review 

- Setting KPIs and targets for staff based on data



(Our director runs a number of businesses and may request your assistance with other businesses for similar tasks also)



What we are looking for



- 4 years + experience in financial analysis, management reporting and operations analytics

- High proficient in excel (pivot tables, advanced formulas, dashboards)

- Understand labour-based businesses

- Be comfortable working with messy data and improving structure

- Be comfortable working with undeveloped systems and assisting to implement systems through your work 

- Be a strong, confident communicator that is highly experienced in your field

- Be able to provide examples of past work

- Ideally, someone with experience in an Australian market in the NDIS space 



The systems we currently use are Xero, Shiftcare, and Employment Hero, where most data will be kept. 



This is NOT a virtual assistant, data entry or social media role. This is an analytical, commercially focused role.



To apply, please
 us with your resume, a description of your past relative work, and attach a sample dashboard or report that you have created in the past.
